s1_en: Please come to the assembly line for a quality check.
s1_cn: 请来装配线做质量检查。
s2_en: The supplier will come to our factory next week for a site audit.
s2_cn: 供应商下周来工厂做现场审核。
s3_en: When does the new model come to market in Europe?
s3_cn: 新车型什么时候在欧洲上市？

s1_en: We need to get the parts ready before production starts.
s1_cn: 我们需要在生产开始前准备好零件。
s2_en: Did you get the test report from the R&D lab?
s2_cn: 你拿到研发实验室的测试报告了吗？
s3_en: Let's get feedback from overseas dealers on the new design.
s3_cn: 我们收集一下海外经销商对新设计的反馈。

s1_en: The chief engineer will give a presentation on the new platform.
s1_cn: 总工程师将做关于新平台的演示。
s2_en: Please give me the production data for Q3 by Friday.
s2_cn: 请在周五前给我第三季度的生产数据。
s3_en: This design gives us better fuel efficiency and lower emissions.
s3_cn: 这个设计带来更好的燃油效率和更低的排放。

s1_en: The new SUV will go into production next month.
s1_cn: 新SUV下月投入生产。
s2_en: We need to go through the quality audit before shipment.
s2_cn: 我们需要在发货前通过质量审核。
s3_en: Let's go over the supply chain process with the logistics team.
s3_cn: 我们和物流团队过一遍供应链流程。

phrase_en: keep the production schedule on track
s1_en: We must keep the production schedule on track to meet the delivery deadline.
s1_cn: 我们必须保持生产进度以赶上交货期。
s2_en: Keep the workshop clean and organized at all times.
s2_cn: 始终保持车间整洁有序。
s3_en: Keep records of all quality inspections for traceability.
s3_cn: 保留所有质量检查记录以备追溯。

s1_en: Let the supplier know about the design change immediately.
s1_cn: 立即通知供应商设计变更的事。
s2_en: Let me check the inventory levels before confirming the order.
s2_cn: 让我先查一下库存水平再确认订单。
s3_en: Let's start the crash test simulation in the virtual lab.
s3_cn: 我们在虚拟实验室开始碰撞测试模拟吧。

s1_en: The R&D team will make a prototype for testing next week.
s1_cn: 研发团队下周制作测试样件。
s2_en: We need to make a decision on the supplier selection by Monday.
s2_cn: 我们需要在周一前对供应商选择做出决定。
s3_en: This machine can make 500 precision parts per hour.
s3_cn: 这台机器每小时能生产500个精密零件。

s1_en: Let's put together an assembly plan for the new production line.
s1_cn: 我们为新产线制定装配计划。
s2_en: Put the safety manual on every workbench in the workshop.
s2_cn: 在车间每个工作台上放置安全手册。
s3_en: Please put the defect report into the quality management system.
s3_cn: 请把缺陷报告录入质量管理系统。

s1_en: The variation in the test data seems like a quality issue.
s1_cn: 测试数据的偏差似乎是质量问题。
s2_en: It seems that the supplier has delayed the shipment again.
s2_cn: 看来供应商又推迟了发货。
s3_en: The engine noise seems to come from the turbocharger area.
s3_cn: 发动机噪音似乎来自涡轮增压器区域。

s1_en: Please take a sample from each batch for inspection.
s1_cn: 请从每批次取样检查。
s2_en: It will take three weeks to complete the crash test program.
s2_cn: 完成碰撞测试项目需要三周时间。
s3_en: The manager will take charge of the overseas project.
s3_cn: 经理将负责海外项目。

s1_en: The QA team is responsible for quality control at every stage.
s1_cn: 质量保证团队负责每个阶段的质量控制。
s2_en: All parts must be inspected before assembly.
s2_cn: 所有零件必须在装配前经过检验。
s3_en: The new factory will be operational by the end of this year.
s3_cn: 新工厂将在今年底投入运营。

s1_en: We need to do a final inspection before the vehicle leaves the plant.
s1_cn: 车辆出厂前需要做终检。
s2_en: Please do a thorough check on the welding robots.
s2_cn: 请对焊接机器人做一次彻底检查。
s3_en: The supplier did not meet the delivery deadline last month.
s3_cn: 供应商上个月没有赶上交货期限。

s1_en: Each shift has a production target of 200 vehicles.
s1_cn: 每个班次的生产目标是200辆车。
s2_en: We have received the updated design specs from R&D.
s2_cn: 我们已收到研发部更新的设计规格。
s3_en: The supplier has to meet the IATF 16949 quality standard.
s3_cn: 供应商必须达到IATF 16949质量标准。

s1_en: The quality report says there are no critical defects.
s1_cn: 质量报告显示没有关键缺陷。
s2_en: Can you say what caused the production line stoppage?
s2_cn: 你能说明导致产线停机的原因吗？
s3_en: The customer survey says we need to improve after-sales service.
s3_cn: 客户调查表明我们需要改善售后服务。

s1_en: You can see the real-time output on the production dashboard.
s1_cn: 你可以在生产看板上看到实时产量。
s2_en: Let me see the supplier evaluation report first.
s2_cn: 让我先看一下供应商评估报告。
s3_en: We see a growing demand for electric vehicles in overseas markets.
s3_cn: 我们看到海外市场对电动汽车的需求不断增长。

phrase_en: send the shipment to the dealer
s1_en: Please send the shipment to the dealer by Friday.
s1_cn: 请在周五前发货给经销商。
s2_en: We will send the updated technical drawings to the supplier.
s2_cn: 我们将把更新的技术图纸发给供应商。
s3_en: The system will send an alert when inventory drops below the safety level.
s3_cn: 库存低于安全水位时系统会发出预警。

s1_en: A shortage of chips may cause a production delay next month.
s1_cn: 芯片短缺可能导致下个月生产延误。
s2_en: The new regulation may affect our export strategy.
s2_cn: 新法规可能影响我们的出口策略。
s3_en: Suppliers may submit their quotes through the online portal.
s3_cn: 供应商可以通过在线门户提交报价。

s1_en: The company will launch the new model at the auto show.
s1_cn: 公司将在车展上发布新车型。
s2_en: Production will resume once the quality issue is resolved.
s2_cn: 质量问题解决后将恢复生产。
s3_en: We will expand our dealer network in Southeast Asia next year.
s3_cn: 明年我们将在东南亚扩大经销商网络。

s1_en: We need to talk about the production plan for next week.
s1_cn: 我们需要讨论下周的生产计划。
s2_en: The report is about the supplier quality performance.
s2_cn: 报告是关于供应商质量表现的。
s3_en: Please send me information about the new material specification.
s3_cn: 请发给我关于新材料规格的信息。

s1_en: The quality standard applies across all production lines.
s1_cn: 质量标准适用于所有生产线。
s2_en: We coordinate across departments for new model launches.
s2_cn: 我们跨部门协调新车型发布。
s3_en: Data is shared across the supply chain network.
s3_cn: 数据在供应链网络中共享。

s1_en: We will ship the parts after the quality audit.
s1_cn: 我们将在质量审核后发货。
s2_en: Please update the record after each inspection.
s2_cn: 每次检验后请更新记录。
s3_en: Production resumed after the safety check was completed.
s3_cn: 安全检查完成后恢复了生产。

s1_en: Please check the parts against the quality standard.
s1_cn: 请对照质量标准检查零件。
s2_en: We test the vehicle against crash safety requirements.
s2_cn: 我们对照碰撞安全要求测试车辆。
s3_en: The supplier's performance is measured against KPIs.
s3_cn: 供应商表现对照KPI进行衡量。

s1_en: We selected the best supplier among five candidates.
s1_cn: 我们从五个候选中选出最佳供应商。
s2_en: Quality issues are common among new suppliers.
s2_cn: 质量问题在新供应商中较常见。
s3_en: Best practices are shared among all plants.
s3_cn: 最佳实践在所有工厂间共享。

s1_en: Please meet me at the assembly line at 10 AM.
s1_cn: 请上午10点在装配线见我。
s2_en: The defect rate at Station 5 is higher than the target.
s2_cn: 5号工位的缺陷率高于目标值。
s3_en: We produce 800 vehicles at this plant every day.
s3_cn: 我们在这个工厂每天生产800辆车。

s1_en: We must complete all tests before mass production.
s1_cn: 量产前我们必须完成所有测试。
s2_en: Please check the inventory before placing the order.
s2_cn: 下单前请检查库存。
s3_en: All parts must be approved before assembly.
s3_cn: 所有零件必须在装配前获得批准。

s1_en: We need better communication between R&D and production.
s1_cn: 我们需要加强研发与生产之间的沟通。
s2_en: The interface between design and manufacturing is critical.
s2_cn: 设计与制造之间的接口很关键。
s3_en: Please coordinate between the supplier and the dealer.
s3_cn: 请在供应商和经销商之间协调。

s1_en: Please submit the report by the deadline.
s1_cn: 请在截止日期前提交报告。
s2_en: The parts are delivered by the supplier every Monday.
s2_cn: 零件由供应商每周一交付。
s3_en: We reduced the defect rate by 25% this year.
s3_cn: 我们今年将缺陷率降低了25%。

s1_en: We had to shut down the line for maintenance.
s1_cn: 我们不得不停线维护。
s2_en: Production was down for two hours due to a power outage.
s2_cn: 因停电生产中断了两小时。
s3_en: Please write down the defect code on the report.
s3_cn: 请在报告上写下缺陷代码。

s1_en: We source critical parts from the approved supplier list.
s1_cn: 我们从批准的供应商名单中采购关键零件。
s2_en: The design change came from the R&D department.
s2_cn: 设计变更来自研发部门。
s3_en: Please separate the defective parts from the good ones.
s3_cn: 请将缺陷零件与合格品分开。

s1_en: There are five assembly lines in the factory.
s1_cn: 工厂里有五条装配线。
s2_en: Please record the data in the quality system.
s2_cn: 请在质量系统中记录数据。
s3_en: We invest heavily in new technology.
s3_cn: 我们在新技术上投入巨大。

s1_en: Please turn off the machine before leaving the workstation.
s1_cn: 离开工位前请关闭机器。
s2_en: The line was off for scheduled maintenance this morning.
s2_cn: 今早产线因计划维护停机。
s3_en: Take off the safety cover only after the line stops.
s3_cn: 产线停止后才能取下安全罩。

s1_en: There was a stoppage on the production line this morning.
s1_cn: 今天早上生产线上发生了停机。
s2_en: Please focus on the quality of the welding process.
s2_cn: 请关注焊接过程的质量。
s3_en: The new model is on schedule for launch.
s3_cn: 新车型按计划发布。

s1_en: Our daily output is over the production target.
s1_cn: 我们的日产量超过生产目标。
s2_en: The quality issue was resolved over the weekend.
s2_cn: 质量问题在周末解决了。
s3_en: Please go over the inspection checklist before shipping.
s3_cn: 发货前请过一遍检验清单。

s1_en: We track every part through the supply chain.
s1_cn: 我们通过供应链跟踪每个零件。
s2_en: The approval goes through three levels of review.
s2_cn: 审批需经过三级审核。
s3_en: Please follow through on the corrective action plan.
s3_cn: 请落实纠正措施计划。

s1_en: We ship vehicles to the dealer within 48 hours.
s1_cn: 我们在48小时内将车辆发运给经销商。
s2_en: Please report to the plant manager immediately.
s2_cn: 请立即向工厂经理汇报。
s3_en: The supplier agreed to the new delivery schedule.
s3_cn: 供应商同意了新的交货计划。

s1_en: The defective part is still under warranty.
s1_cn: 缺陷零件仍在保修期内。
s2_en: The project is under review by the management team.
s2_cn: 项目正在管理团队审核中。
s3_en: Parts stored under improper conditions may degrade.
s3_cn: 存储条件不当的零件可能退化。

s1_en: We need to set up the new assembly line by next month.
s1_cn: 我们需要在下月前设置好新装配线。
s2_en: Please speed up the production to meet the deadline.
s2_cn: 请加快生产以赶上截止日期。
s3_en: The system is up and running after the update.
s3_cn: 系统更新后已正常运行。

s1_en: We work closely with the supplier on quality improvement.
s1_cn: 我们与供应商密切合作改善质量。
s2_en: Please compare this batch with the previous one.
s2_cn: 请将此批次与上一批次对比。
s3_en: The new model comes with advanced safety features.
s3_cn: 新车型配备先进的安全功能。

s1_en: Please proceed as per the standard operating procedure.
s1_cn: 请按标准作业程序进行。
s2_en: The supplier serves as our backup source for critical parts.
s2_cn: 该供应商作为我们关键零件的备用来源。
s3_en: We use the same material as specified in the design.
s3_cn: 我们使用设计中指定的相同材料。

s1_en: We test every batch for quality assurance.
s1_cn: 我们为质量保证测试每批次。
s2_en: This procedure is for supplier qualification only.
s2_cn: 此流程仅用于供应商资质审核。
s3_en: The budget for R&D was increased by 10%.
s3_cn: 研发预算增加了10%。

s1_en: The quality of the product meets customer expectations.
s1_cn: 产品质量满足客户期望。
s2_en: Please provide a list of approved suppliers.
s2_cn: 请提供批准的供应商名单。
s3_en: The cost of raw materials increased this quarter.
s3_cn: 本季度原材料成本上升了。

s1_en: Please wait till the batch is complete before testing.
s1_cn: 请等到批次完成再测试。
s2_en: We cannot ship till the quality sign-off is received.
s2_cn: 收到质量签字前不能发货。
s3_en: The line runs till 10 PM during peak season.
s3_cn: 旺季产线运行到晚上10点。

s1_en: The defect rate is higher than the target this month.
s1_cn: 本月缺陷率高于目标。
s2_en: We produce more vehicles than last year.
s2_cn: 我们生产的车辆比去年多。
s3_en: The supplier delivered earlier than expected.
s3_cn: 供应商比预期更早交货。

s1_en: We need a new supplier for the battery module.
s1_cn: 我们需要一个电池模块的新供应商。
s2_en: A quality audit is scheduled for next week.
s2_cn: 下周安排了一次质量审核。
s3_en: Please prepare a report on the production status.
s3_cn: 请准备一份生产状态报告。

s1_en: The production line runs 24 hours a day.
s1_cn: 生产线每天24小时运行。
s2_en: Please check the inventory before placing the order.
s2_cn: 下单前请检查库存。
s3_en: The supplier confirmed the delivery date.
s3_cn: 供应商确认了交货日期。

s1_en: All approved suppliers must meet IATF 16949.
s1_cn: 所有批准的供应商必须达到IATF 16949。
s2_en: Please inspect all parts before assembly.
s2_cn: 请在装配前检验所有零件。
s3_en: All production data is stored in the central system.
s3_cn: 所有生产数据存储在中央系统中。

s1_en: Please report any quality issues immediately.
s1_cn: 请立即报告任何质量问题。
s2_en: If any defect is found, stop the line and notify the supervisor.
s2_cn: 如发现任何缺陷，停线并通知主管。
s3_en: We do not accept any deviation from the specification.
s3_cn: 我们不接受任何偏离规格的情况。

s1_en: We inspect the equipment every production shift.
s1_cn: 每个生产班次我们都检查设备。
s2_en: Every vehicle goes through a final quality check.
s2_cn: 每辆车都经过最终质量检查。
s3_en: Every supplier is evaluated annually.
s3_cn: 每个供应商每年评估一次。

s1_en: There is little variation between batches.
s1_cn: 批次间偏差很小。
s2_en: We have little time to prepare for the audit.
s2_cn: 我们几乎没有时间准备审核。
s3_en: The supplier has little experience with automotive standards.
s3_cn: 供应商对汽车标准几乎没经验。

s1_en: Much of the production cost comes from raw materials.
s1_cn: 生产成本大部分来自原材料。
s2_en: We have invested much in automation this year.
s2_cn: 我们今年在自动化方面投入很大。
s3_en: The defect rate did not change much after the improvement.
s3_cn: 改进后缺陷率变化不大。

s1_en: No defects are allowed on critical safety parts.
s1_cn: 关键安全零件不允许有缺陷。
s2_en: There is no deviation from the approved design.
s2_cn: 没有偏离批准的设计。
s3_en: No shipment can leave without quality sign-off.
s3_cn: 没有质量签字不能发货。

s1_en: We contacted other suppliers for a backup plan.
s1_cn: 我们联系了其他供应商制定备用方案。
s2_en: The other production lines are running normally.
s2_cn: 其他生产线运行正常。
s3_en: Is there any other issue to discuss at the meeting?
s3_cn: 会上还有其他问题要讨论吗？

s1_en: Some batches failed the incoming inspection.
s1_cn: 部分批次未通过来料检验。
s2_en: We need some additional time for the crash test.
s2_cn: 我们需要一些额外时间做碰撞测试。
s3_en: Some dealers reported customer complaints about the noise.
s3_cn: 一些经销商报告了客户关于噪音的投诉。

s1_en: We follow standards such as IATF 16949.
s1_cn: 我们遵循IATF 16949等标准。
s2_en: Such defects require immediate corrective action.
s2_cn: 此类缺陷需要立即采取纠正措施。
s3_en: We have never seen such a high defect rate before.
s3_cn: 我们以前从未见过这么高的缺陷率。

s1_en: Please ensure that all parts are inspected.
s1_cn: 请确保所有零件都已检验。
s2_en: We confirmed that the supplier meets our requirements.
s2_cn: 我们确认供应商满足我们的要求。
s3_en: The report shows that production is on schedule.
s3_cn: 报告显示生产按计划进行。

s1_en: This production line has the highest output.
s1_cn: 这条生产线产量最高。
s2_en: Please review this design before the meeting.
s2_cn: 会前请审查这个设计。
s3_en: This batch of parts meets all quality requirements.
s3_cn: 这批零件满足所有质量要求。

s1_en: I confirm the test results are correct.
s1_cn: 我确认测试结果正确。
s2_en: I will review the supplier report today.
s2_cn: 我今天会审查供应商报告。
s3_en: I need the production data by end of day.
s3_cn: 我需要在今天结束前拿到生产数据。

s1_en: He is responsible for the quality audit.
s1_cn: 他负责质量审核。
s2_en: He will present the test results at the meeting.
s2_cn: 他将在会上展示测试结果。
s3_en: He confirmed the supplier delivery schedule.
s3_cn: 他确认了供应商交货计划。

s1_en: You need to check the torque settings before assembly.
s1_cn: 你需要在装配前检查扭矩设置。
s2_en: Please make sure you follow the safety procedure.
s2_cn: 请确保你遵循安全流程。
s3_en: You can access the production data in the system.
s3_cn: 你可以在系统中访问生产数据。

s1_en: Who is responsible for the supplier audit?
s1_cn: 谁负责供应商审核？
s2_en: Please find out who approved the design change.
s2_cn: 请查明谁批准了设计变更。
s3_en: We need someone who has experience in crash testing.
s3_cn: 我们需要有碰撞测试经验的人。

s1_en: We focus on both quality and efficiency in production.
s1_cn: 我们在生产中兼顾质量与效率。
s2_en: The supplier and the dealer must sign the agreement.
s2_cn: 供应商和经销商必须签署协议。
s3_en: Please submit the report and the test data together.
s3_cn: 请将报告和测试数据一起提交。

s1_en: Production stopped because of a quality issue.
s1_cn: 因质量问题停止了生产。
s2_en: We chose this supplier because of their track record.
s2_cn: 因为该供应商的业绩记录我们选择了他们。
s3_en: The launch was delayed because the tests were not complete.
s3_cn: 因测试未完成发布被推迟。

s1_en: The parts were tested but not approved for production.
s1_cn: 零件已测试但未批准生产。
s2_en: The supplier met the quality target but missed the delivery deadline.
s2_cn: 供应商达到质量目标但未赶上交货期。
s3_en: We want to expand overseas, but the budget is limited.
s3_cn: 我们想拓展海外市场，但预算有限。

s1_en: We need to repair or replace the defective parts.
s1_cn: 我们需要维修或更换缺陷零件。
s2_en: Please submit the report by email or through the system.
s2_cn: 请通过邮件或系统提交报告。
s3_en: The supplier must use standard or certified materials only.
s3_cn: 供应商只能使用标准或认证材料。

s1_en: We will proceed if the quality is approved by the QA team.
s1_cn: 如果质量通过QA团队审核我们就继续。
s2_en: If the supplier is late, we will use the backup source.
s2_cn: 如果供应商延迟，我们将启用备用供应商。
s3_en: Please notify me if there are any production issues.
s3_cn: 如果有任何生产问题请通知我。

s1_en: The delivery was late, though the quality was acceptable.
s1_cn: 交货虽迟但质量可接受。
s2_en: Though the test failed, we identified the root cause.
s2_cn: 虽然测试失败，但我们找到了根本原因。
s3_en: The design is complex though it meets all requirements.
s3_cn: 设计虽然复杂但满足所有要求。

s1_en: Do not enter the area while the line is running.
s1_cn: 产线运行时不要进入该区域。
s2_en: While the supplier improves quality, we will use the backup source.
s2_cn: 在供应商改进质量期间，我们将使用备用来源。
s3_en: We monitor the process while the machine is operating.
s3_cn: 机器运行时我们监控过程。

s1_en: We discussed how to improve quality at the supplier review.
s1_cn: 在供应商评审中我们讨论了如何提升质量。
s2_en: Can you explain how the new inspection system works?
s2_cn: 你能解释一下新检验系统如何运作吗？
s3_en: Please show the operator how to use the torque wrench.
s3_cn: 请向操作员演示如何使用扭矩扳手。

s1_en: Please wear safety equipment when the line is running.
s1_cn: 产线运行时请佩戴安全装备。
s2_en: When will the new model be ready for mass production?
s2_cn: 新车型什么时候可以量产？
s3_en: Contact the supplier when the inventory drops below 500.
s3_cn: 库存低于500时联系供应商。

s1_en: Please mark where the defect was found on the diagram.
s1_cn: 请在图纸上标出发现缺陷的位置。
s2_en: We need to know where the parts are stored in the warehouse.
s2_cn: 我们需要知道零件在仓库中的存放位置。
s3_en: This is where we assemble the engine module.
s3_cn: 这里是我们装配发动机模块的地方。

s1_en: The why directly affects our delivery schedule.
s1_cn: 为什么直接影响我们的交付计划。
s2_en: The why requires approval from the quality manager.
s2_cn: 为什么需要质量经理批准。
s3_en: We improved the why to reduce production costs.
s3_cn: 我们改进了为什么以降低生产成本。

s1_en: We need to test the parts again after the fix.
s1_cn: 修复后我们需要重新测试零件。
s2_en: Please check the calibration again before starting.
s2_cn: 启动前请再次检查校准。
s3_en: The supplier failed the audit again this year.
s3_cn: 该供应商今年审核又没通过。

s1_en: This is the highest output ever recorded at this plant.
s1_cn: 这是该工厂有记录以来的最高产量。
s2_en: Have you ever seen this type of defect before?
s2_cn: 你以前见过这种类型的缺陷吗？
s3_en: The defect rate is the lowest ever achieved.
s3_cn: 缺陷率是史上最低的。

s1_en: The new model far exceeds the safety standard.
s1_cn: 新车型远超安全标准。
s2_en: Our factory is far from the supplier's warehouse.
s2_cn: 我们工厂离供应商仓库很远。
s3_en: So far, we have produced 50,000 vehicles this year.
s3_cn: 今年到目前为止我们已生产5万辆车。

s1_en: We can move forward with the supplier approval process.
s1_cn: 我们可以推进供应商审批流程。
s2_en: Please forward the test report to the engineering team.
s2_cn: 请将测试报告转发给工程团队。
s3_en: We look forward to the new model launch next quarter.
s3_cn: 我们期待下季度新车型发布。

s1_en: Here at the plant, we produce 800 vehicles per day.
s1_cn: 在工厂这里，我们每天生产800辆车。
s2_en: Please sign here on the quality inspection form.
s2_cn: 请在质量检验表上这里签字。
s3_en: The parts you need are stored here in the warehouse.
s3_cn: 你需要的零件存放在这里的仓库中。

s1_en: Store the materials near the assembly area for easy access.
s1_cn: 将材料存放在靠近装配区便于取用。
s2_en: Our warehouse is near the manufacturing plant.
s2_cn: 我们的仓库靠近制造工厂。
s3_en: The supplier is located near our main distribution center.
s3_cn: 供应商靠近我们的主要配送中心。

s1_en: The new model is now in mass production.
s1_cn: 新车型正在量产中。
s2_en: We now require all suppliers to use the online portal.
s2_cn: 我们现在要求所有供应商使用在线门户。
s3_en: The quality system is now fully operational.
s3_cn: 质量系统现已全面运行。

s1_en: Please check out the parts before they leave the plant.
s1_cn: 零件出厂前请检查。
s2_en: We found out the root cause of the defect.
s2_cn: 我们查明了缺陷的根本原因。
s3_en: The test was carried out according to the standard.
s3_cn: 测试按标准执行。

s1_en: The design is still under review by the engineering team.
s1_cn: 设计仍在工程团队审核中。
s2_en: The supplier still has not confirmed the delivery date.
s2_cn: 供应商仍未确认交货日期。
s3_en: We are still waiting for the crash test results.
s3_cn: 我们仍在等待碰撞测试结果。

s1_en: First inspect the parts, then test the assembly.
s1_cn: 先检验零件，然后测试装配。
s2_en: The design was approved, then we started production.
s2_cn: 设计批准后我们开始生产。
s3_en: Complete the report, then submit it to the manager.
s3_cn: 完成报告后提交给经理。

s1_en: There is a defect on the surface of the part.
s1_cn: 零件表面存在缺陷。
s2_en: There are 200 vehicles waiting for final inspection.
s2_cn: 有200辆车等待终检。
s3_en: Is there any update from the supplier?
s3_cn: 供应商那边有更新吗？

s1_en: R&D and production must work together on new model launches.
s1_cn: 研发和生产必须在新车型发布上协同工作。
s2_en: Please review the design and the cost estimate together.
s2_cn: 请一起审查设计和成本估算。
s3_en: We bundle the parts together for efficient shipping.
s3_cn: 我们将零件打包在一起以便高效运输。

s1_en: The new machine performs well in the durability test.
s1_cn: 新机器在耐久性测试中表现良好。
s2_en: The supplier has done well in meeting delivery targets.
s2_cn: 供应商在达成交货目标方面表现不错。
s3_en: We need to plan well to avoid production delays.
s3_cn: 我们需要做好计划以避免生产延误。

s1_en: The production line is almost complete.
s1_cn: 生产线即将完工。
s2_en: We have almost reached our annual production target.
s2_cn: 我们几乎达到了年度生产目标。
s3_en: The test is almost done; results will be ready tomorrow.
s3_cn: 测试即将完成，结果明天出来。

s1_en: The material must be strong enough for crash safety.
s1_cn: 材料必须足够坚固以保证碰撞安全。
s2_en: We have enough inventory for two weeks of production.
s2_cn: 我们有足够两周生产的库存。
s3_en: Is the data reliable enough for the sourcing decision?
s3_cn: 数据是否足够可靠以做采购决策？

s1_en: The new model's efficiency is even higher than expected.
s1_cn: 新车型的效率甚至高于预期。
s2_en: Even experienced operators must follow the SOP.
s2_cn: 即使经验丰富的操作员也必须遵循SOP。
s3_en: We test every part, even from our most trusted supplier.
s3_cn: 我们测试每个零件，即使是来自最信任的供应商。

s1_en: The design change is not approved yet.
s1_cn: 设计变更尚未批准。
s2_en: The parts are not ready for assembly.
s2_cn: 零件尚未准备好装配。
s3_en: We can not ship without the quality sign-off.
s3_cn: 没有质量签字我们不能发货。

s1_en: Use only approved suppliers for critical parts.
s1_cn: 关键零件仅使用批准的供应商。
s2_en: This issue affects only Line 3, not the whole plant.
s2_cn: 此问题仅影响3号线，不影响整个工厂。
s3_en: We have only three days to complete the inspection.
s3_cn: 我们只有三天时间完成检验。

s1_en: The new material is quite different from the previous one.
s1_cn: 新材料与之前的完全不同。
s2_en: The supplier's quality has improved quite a lot.
s2_cn: 供应商的质量有了很大提升。
s3_en: The test result was quite surprising to the team.
s3_cn: 测试结果令团队相当意外。

s1_en: We test every batch so that defects are caught early.
s1_cn: 我们测试每批次以便及早发现缺陷。
s2_en: The defect rate is so low that we passed the audit.
s2_cn: 缺陷率如此之低，我们通过了审核。
s3_en: Please document the process so others can follow.
s3_cn: 请记录流程以便他人遵循。

s1_en: Supplier quality is very important to our production.
s1_cn: 供应商质量对我们的生产非常重要。
s2_en: The surface finish must be very smooth.
s2_cn: 表面处理必须非常光滑。
s3_en: We are very close to meeting the annual target.
s3_cn: 我们非常接近达成年度目标。

s1_en: Please submit the test report by tomorrow.
s1_cn: 请在明天前提交测试报告。
s2_en: The supplier will deliver the samples tomorrow morning.
s2_cn: 供应商明早交付样品。
s3_en: We have a production meeting tomorrow at 9 AM.
s3_cn: 我们明天早上9点开生产会议。

s1_en: Yesterday's production output exceeded the target.
s1_cn: 昨天的产量超过了目标。
s2_en: The supplier sent the quotation yesterday.
s2_cn: 供应商昨天发了报价。
s3_en: We identified the defect during yesterday's inspection.
s3_cn: 我们在昨天的检验中发现了缺陷。

s1_en: Our North America market grew by 15% this year.
s1_cn: 我们北美市场今年增长了15%。
s2_en: The northern plant produces electric vehicle batteries.
s2_cn: 北部工厂生产电动汽车电池。
s3_en: We are expanding our dealer network in the north.
s3_cn: 我们正在北部扩大经销商网络。

s1_en: We plan to enter the Southeast Asian market.
s1_cn: 我们计划进入东南亚市场。
s2_en: The southern plant specializes in SUV production.
s2_cn: 南部工厂专注于SUV生产。
s3_en: Our southern region reported strong sales growth.
s3_cn: 我们南部地区报告了强劲的销售增长。

s1_en: The East Asia market is our largest overseas region.
s1_cn: 东亚市场是我们最大的海外区域。
s2_en: Our eastern factory supplies parts to all Asian plants.
s2_cn: 我们东部工厂向所有亚洲工厂供应零件。
s3_en: We export vehicles to the Middle East and beyond.
s3_cn: 我们向中东及更远地区出口车辆。

s1_en: We are expanding into Western Europe next year.
s1_cn: 我们明年将拓展到西欧市场。
s2_en: Our western distribution center covers three provinces.
s2_cn: 我们西部配送中心覆盖三个省。
s3_en: The supplier is located in the western industrial zone.
s3_cn: 供应商位于西部工业区。

s1_en: We coordinate the please with the supplier and dealer.
s1_cn: 我们与供应商和经销商协调请。
s2_en: The please is critical for vehicle safety.
s2_cn: 请对车辆安全至关重要。
s3_en: The please was validated through a pilot run.
s3_cn: 请通过试生产验证。

s1_en: Yes, the parts passed the quality inspection.
s1_cn: 是的，零件通过了质量检验。
s2_en: Yes, we can deliver the shipment by Friday.
s2_cn: 是的，我们可以在周五前交货。
s3_en: Yes, the design change was approved.
s3_cn: 是的，设计变更已获批准。

s1_en: We need to review the supplier account before placing new orders.
s1_cn: 下新订单前我们需要审核供应商账户。
s2_en: The finance team manages all supplier accounts in the ERP system.
s2_cn: 财务团队在ERP系统中管理所有供应商账户。
s3_en: Please open a new account for the overseas distributor.
s3_cn: 请为海外经销商开立新账户。

s1_en: Please act according to the standard operating procedure.
s1_cn: 请按标准作业程序行动。
s2_en: We need to act the parts before the next process step.
s2_cn: 我们需要在下一工序前行动零件。
s3_en: The operator will act the machine at the start of each shift.
s3_cn: 操作员每个班次开始时会行动机器。

s1_en: We track addition data across all production lines in real time.
s1_cn: 我们实时追踪所有产线的增加；加法数据。
s2_en: The addition process is validated before mass production begins.
s2_cn: 量产开始前验证增加；加法工艺。
s3_en: An abnormal addition reading triggers an automatic line stop.
s3_cn: 异常的增加；加法读数触发自动停线。

s1_en: The adjustment parameter is recorded in the MES system every shift.
s1_cn: 调整参数每班次记录在MES系统中。
s2_en: We track adjustment data across all production lines in real time.
s2_cn: 我们实时追踪所有产线的调整数据。
s3_en: The adjustment target for this quarter was achieved ahead of schedule.
s3_cn: 本季度的调整目标提前达成。

s1_en: We track advertisement trends across all target export markets.
s1_cn: 我们追踪所有目标出口市场的广告趋势。
s2_en: The advertisement target for the Southeast Asian market was exceeded.
s2_cn: 东南亚市场的广告目标已超额完成。
s3_en: A new advertisement initiative will launch in the European market next year.
s3_cn: 新的广告计划明年将在欧洲市场启动。

s1_en: We signed a three-year supply agreement with the steel manufacturer.
s1_cn: 我们与钢铁制造商签订了三年供应协议。
s2_en: The supply agreement includes quality and delivery terms.
s2_cn: 供应协议包含质量和交货条款。
s3_en: Please review the agreement before the legal team finalizes it.
s3_cn: 法务团队最终确认前请审核协议。

s1_en: We monitor air conditions in the paint booth continuously.
s1_cn: 我们持续监控喷漆室的空气条件。
s2_en: The air reading is logged every 15 minutes during production.
s2_cn: 空气读数在生产期间每15分钟记录一次。
s3_en: Extreme air conditions are tested in the climate chamber.
s3_cn: 极端空气条件在气候舱中测试。

s1_en: A disruption in amount triggers our contingency sourcing procedure.
s1_cn: 数量中断触发我们的应急采购程序。
s2_en: We optimize amount to reduce lead time and inventory cost.
s2_cn: 我们优化数量以缩短交付周期和库存成本。
s3_en: We track amount from raw material to final assembly.
s3_cn: 我们从原材料到总装全程追踪数量。

s1_en: We track amusement trends across all target export markets.
s1_cn: 我们追踪所有目标出口市场的娱乐趋势。
s2_en: The amusement target for the Southeast Asian market was exceeded.
s2_cn: 东南亚市场的娱乐目标已超额完成。
s3_en: A new amusement initiative will launch in the European market next year.
s3_cn: 新的娱乐计划明年将在欧洲市场启动。

s1_en: We ensure animal-free materials in interior components.
s1_cn: 我们确保内饰零件不含动物源材料。
s2_en: Environmental impact on animal habitats is assessed before construction.
s2_cn: 建设前评估对动物栖息地的影响。
s3_en: The animal repellent coating protects vehicle wiring.
s3_cn: 防动物涂层保护车辆线路。

s1_en: We analyze answer data to identify root causes of defects.
s1_cn: 我们分析答案；回答数据以识别缺陷根本原因。
s2_en: We reduced answer issues by 35 percent through process optimization.
s2_cn: 我们通过工艺优化减少了35%的答案；回答问题。
s3_en: The answer report must be signed by the quality manager before release.
s3_cn: 答案；回答报告在放行前必须由质量经理签署。

s1_en: We inspect the apparatus for wear and accuracy every 500 cycles.
s1_cn: 我们每500次循环检查设备；器械的磨损和精度。
s2_en: Operators must verify apparatus condition before starting the operation.
s2_cn: 操作员在开始操作前必须验证设备；器械状态。
s3_en: The apparatus is calibrated before each production shift starts.
s3_cn: 设备；器械在每个生产班次开始前校准。

s1_en: We need engineering approval before changing the material specification.
s1_cn: 更改材料规格前需要工程批准。
s2_en: The design approval process takes about two weeks.
s2_cn: 设计批准流程大约需要两周。
s3_en: All cost changes require manager approval.
s3_cn: 所有成本变更都需要经理批准。

s1_en: The argument strategy is reviewed at the quarterly business meeting.
s1_cn: 争论；论点战略在季度业务会议上评审。
s2_en: We analyze argument data to optimize our dealer incentive program.
s2_cn: 我们分析争论；论点数据以优化经销商激励计划。
s3_en: We track argument trends across all target export markets.
s3_cn: 我们追踪所有目标出口市场的争论；论点趋势。

s1_en: The art strategy is reviewed at the quarterly business meeting.
s1_cn: 艺术战略在季度业务会议上评审。
s2_en: We benchmark our art performance against industry leaders.
s2_cn: 我们对照行业领导者对标艺术绩效。
s3_en: We track art trends across all target export markets.
s3_cn: 我们追踪所有目标出口市场的艺术趋势。

s1_en: The attack is logged in the digital operations logbook.
s1_cn: 攻击记录在数字化运营日志中。
s2_en: We monitor attack as part of our operational excellence program.
s2_cn: 我们将攻击作为卓越运营计划的一部分进行监控。
s3_en: Any change to attack requires sign off from the section leader.
s3_cn: 攻击的任何变更需要工段长签字。

s1_en: We benchmark attempt practices against industry best in class.
s1_cn: 我们对照行业最佳实践对标尝试做法。
s2_en: The attempt is included in the monthly operations report to management.
s2_cn: 尝试包含在提交管理层的月度运营报告中。
s3_en: The attempt is reviewed during the daily production standup meeting.
s3_cn: 尝试在每日生产站会上评审。

s1_en: We integrate attention goals into the performance review cycle.
s1_cn: 我们将注意力目标纳入绩效评审周期。
s2_en: Cross functional attention training is provided to all new hires.
s2_cn: 所有新员工接受跨部门注意力培训。
s3_en: The attention development program supports career growth for all employees.
s3_cn: 注意力发展计划支持所有员工的职业成长。

s1_en: We track attraction as a key performance indicator in the plant dashboard.
s1_cn: 我们将吸引力；景作为工厂看板的关键绩效指标追踪。
s2_en: The attraction is included in the monthly operations report to management.
s2_cn: 吸引力；景包含在提交管理层的月度运营报告中。
s3_en: The attraction is reviewed during the daily production standup meeting.
s3_cn: 吸引力；景在每日生产站会上评审。

s1_en: The plant manager has the authority to approve production changes.
s1_cn: 工厂经理有批准生产变更的权限。
s2_en: Please check the approval authority matrix before signing.
s2_cn: 签字前请查看审批权限矩阵。
s3_en: The quality authority rejected the deviation request.
s3_cn: 质量审批部门驳回了偏差申请。

s1_en: The safety team checks back injury reports monthly.
s1_cn: 安全团队每月检查背部伤害报告。
s2_en: Ergonomic design reduces back strain for assembly workers.
s2_cn: 人体工程学设计减少装配工人的背部劳损。
s3_en: Please protect your back when handling heavy materials.
s3_cn: 搬运重型物料时请保护背部。

s1_en: The balance shaft reduces engine vibration at high RPM.
s1_cn: 平衡轴降低了高转速时的发动机振动。
s2_en: We check the balance of each wheel before final assembly.
s2_cn: 我们在总装前检查每个车轮的动平衡。
s3_en: The balance between cost and quality is managed in the value engineering review.
s3_cn: 成本与质量的平衡在价值工程评审中管理。

s1_en: The base target was set based on benchmark competitor analysis.
s1_cn: 基础目标基于竞品对标分析设定。
s2_en: The base validation test passed all acceptance criteria.
s2_cn: 基础验证测试通过了所有验收标准。
s3_en: A deviation in base must be approved by the chief engineer.

s1_en: We plan to enter the Southeast Asian market next year.

s1_en: The mass is included in the monthly operations report to management.

s3_en: The meat is included in the monthly operations report to management.
s3_cn: 肉包含在提交管理层的月度运营报告中。

s3_en: The mind specification is defined in the engineering drawing.

s1_en: Mine is the first shift on the assembly line.

s2_cn: 这份报告是我的，不是供应商的。
s3_en: The responsibility for quality inspection is mine.
s3_cn: 质量检验的责任是我的。

s1_en: Production targets are tracked per minute.

s3_en: We review supplier performance on a minute basis.

s1_en: Vehicle performance is verified under mist conditions.

s2_cn: 耐久性测试中我们监控薄雾水平。
s3_en: Protection against mist is built into the vehicle design.

s1_en: The money forecast is updated quarterly based on market conditions.

s3_cn: 我们优化钱分配以最大化投资回报。

s1_en: The month output exceeded our target by 5 percent.
s1_cn: 月产量超出目标5%。

s3_cn: 月班次报告零安全事故。

s1_en: The morning resistance test was passed successfully.
s1_cn: 抗早晨测试顺利通过。

s3_en: The morning test simulates extreme environmental conditions.

s2_cn: 毒药标准符合ISO 45001要求。
s3_en: The poison safety protocol is mandatory for all plant operators.
s3_cn: 毒药安全协议对所有车间操作员是强制性的。

s1_en: We polish the surface finish to achieve the required gloss level.
s1_cn: 我们抛光表面以达到要求的光泽度。
s2_en: The polishing process removes minor scratches from the paint.
s2_cn: 抛光工艺去除漆面的轻微划痕。
s3_en: Operators polish the body panels before the final inspection.
s3_cn: 操作员在终检前抛光车身面板。

s1_en: We benchmark porter practices against industry best in class.
s1_cn: 我们对照行业最佳实践对标搬运工做法。
s2_en: The porter is updated in the system before each model year changeover.
s2_cn: 搬运工在每个年款换型前在系统中更新。
s3_en: Any change to porter requires approval from the process owner.
s3_cn: 搬运工的任何变更需要工艺负责人批准。

s1_en: Any change to position requires sign off from the section leader.
s1_cn: 位置；职位的任何变更需要工段长签字。
s2_en: The position is reviewed during the daily production standup.
s2_cn: 位置；职位在每日生产站会上评审。
s3_en: The position is logged in the digital operations logbook.
s3_cn: 位置；职位记录在数字化运营日志中。

s1_en: The powder property is documented in the material data sheet.
s1_cn: 粉末性能记录在材料数据表中。
s2_en: The powder specification is updated in the PLM system.
s2_cn: 粉末规格在PLM系统中更新。
s3_en: A change in powder requires requalification of the supplier process.
s3_cn: 粉末变更需要重新验证供应商工艺。

s1_en: The power is included in the monthly operations report to management.
s1_cn: 力量；电力包含在提交管理层的月度运营报告中。
s2_en: The power is updated in the system before each model year changeover.
s2_cn: 力量；电力在每个年款换型前在系统中更新。
s3_en: We track power as a key performance indicator in the plant dashboard.
s3_cn: 我们将力量；电力作为工厂看板的关键绩效指标追踪。

s1_en: The supplier offered a competitive unit price for the components.
s1_cn: 供应商为零件提供了有竞争力的单价。
s2_en: We need to negotiate the price for the new contract.
s2_cn: 我们需要为新合同谈判价格。
s3_en: The dealer price list is updated every quarter.
s3_cn: 经销商价格表每季度更新。

s1_en: We print 3D prototype parts for design verification testing.
s1_cn: 我们3D打印原型零件用于设计验证测试。
s2_en: The printed labels must include the part number and batch code.
s2_cn: 打印的标签必须包含零件号和批次代码。
s3_en: We print the inspection report directly from the quality system.
s3_cn: 我们直接从质量系统打印检验报告。

s1_en: We improved the manufacturing process to reduce cycle time.
s1_cn: 我们改进了制造工艺以缩短周期时间。
s2_en: Each process step must be documented in the SOP.
s2_cn: 每个工艺步骤必须记录在标准作业指导书中。
s3_en: The new process was validated through a pilot run.
s3_cn: 新工艺通过试生产验证。

s1_en: The supplier can produce 10,000 components per day.
s1_cn: 供应商每天能生产一万个零件。
s2_en: We produce both gasoline and electric vehicles on the same line.
s2_cn: 我们在同一条线上生产燃油车和电动车。
s3_en: The plant will produce the new model starting next month.
s3_cn: 工厂将从下月开始生产新车型。

s1_en: The profit margin on overseas sales is higher than domestic.
s1_cn: 海外销售的利润率高于国内。
s2_en: We need to reduce costs to maintain our profit target.
s2_cn: 我们需要降低成本以维持利润目标。
s3_en: The supplier's profit was affected by raw material prices.
s3_cn: 供应商利润受到原材料价格影响。

s1_en: We track property expenses against the approved budget monthly.
s1_cn: 我们每月对照批准的预算追踪财产；房产支出。
s2_en: A property variance report is generated for any deviation over 5 percent.
s2_cn: 任何超过5%的偏差生成财产；房产差异报告。
s3_en: The property forecast is updated quarterly based on market conditions.
s3_cn: 财产；房产预测根据市场状况每季度更新。

s1_en: Any change to prose requires approval from the process owner.
s1_cn: 散文的任何变更需要工艺负责人批准。
s2_en: The prose is reviewed during the daily production standup meeting.
s2_cn: 散文在每日生产站会上评审。
s3_en: Cross functional prose review is held every two weeks.
s3_cn: 跨部门散文评审每两周举行一次。

s1_en: A supplier protest against a rejection is handled through the formal appeal process.
s1_cn: 供应商对拒收的异议通过正式申诉流程处理。
s2_en: We document any protest from the customer in the complaint log.
s2_cn: 我们将客户的任何异议记录在投诉日志中。
s3_en: The protest resolution must be completed within 5 business days.
s3_cn: 异议解决必须在5个工作日内完成。

s1_en: We need to pull the parts before the next process step.
s1_cn: 我们需要在下一工序前拉零件。
s2_en: The operator will pull the machine at the start of each shift.
s2_cn: 操作员每个班次开始时会拉机器。
s3_en: We plan to pull in the next development cycle.
s3_cn: 我们计划在下一个开发周期拉。

s1_en: The punishment risk assessment is updated annually for each workstation.
s1_cn: 惩罚风险评估每个工位每年更新。
s2_en: punishment prevention measures are implemented across all facilities.
s2_cn: 惩罚预防措施在所有设施中实施。
s3_en: We conduct punishment compliance checks during the annual audit.
s3_cn: 我们在年度审计中进行惩罚合规检查。

s1_en: We benchmark purpose practices against industry best in class.
s1_cn: 我们对照行业最佳实践对标目的；意义做法。
s2_en: The purpose is included in the monthly operations report to management.
s2_cn: 目的；意义包含在提交管理层的月度运营报告中。
s3_en: The purpose is documented in the engineering change request.
s3_cn: 目的；意义记录在工程变更申请中。

s1_en: The supplier failed to push within the agreed timeframe.
s1_cn: 供应商未能在约定时间内推。
s2_en: The new system helps us push more efficiently.
s2_cn: 新系统帮助我们更高效地推。
s3_en: Please push according to the standard operating procedure.
s3_cn: 请按标准作业程序推。

s1_en: Our quality control standard exceeds the industry requirement.
s1_cn: 我们的质量控制标准超出行业要求。
s2_en: The supplier must meet our quality standard for every shipment.
s2_cn: 供应商每批发货都必须达到我们的质量标准。
s3_en: Quality issues must be reported within 24 hours.
s3_cn: 质量问题必须在24小时内报告。

s1_en: The question standard is referenced in the PPAP submission.
s1_cn: 问题标准在PPAP提交中被引用。
s2_en: We analyze question data to identify root causes of defects.
s2_cn: 我们分析问题数据以识别缺陷根本原因。
s3_en: A question threshold is set for each critical safety component.
s3_cn: 每个安全关键件都设有问题阈值。

s1_en: Vehicle performance is verified under rain conditions.
s1_cn: 车辆性能在雨条件下验证。
s2_en: We monitor rain levels during the durability test.
s2_cn: 耐久性测试中我们监控雨水平。
s3_en: Protection against rain is built into the vehicle design.
s3_cn: 防雨设计已融入车辆中。

s1_en: The range plan covers all critical components from tier one suppliers.
s1_cn: 范围；区间计划覆盖所有一级供应商的关键零件。
s2_en: The range agreement includes delivery performance penalties.
s2_cn: 范围；区间协议包含交付绩效罚款条款。
s3_en: We track range from raw material to final assembly.
s3_cn: 我们从原材料到总装全程追踪范围；区间。

s1_en: The rate audit confirmed compliance with internal controls.
s1_cn: 比率；速度审计确认符合内部控制要求。
s2_en: The rate investment requires approval from the CFO.
s2_cn: 比率；速度投资需要首席财务官批准。
s3_en: The rate cost analysis is presented at the monthly finance review.
s3_cn: 比率；速度成本分析在月度财务评审中汇报。

s1_en: Seasonal ray patterns are considered in the test planning.
s1_cn: 季节性光线；射线模式在测试计划中被考虑。
s2_en: Extreme ray conditions are tested in the climate chamber.
s2_cn: 极端光线；射线条件在气候舱中测试。
s3_en: The ray environment test simulates real world operating conditions.
s3_cn: 光线；射线环境测试模拟真实使用条件。

s1_en: Operators receive reaction training before working on the new line.
s1_cn: 操作员在上线前接受反应培训。
s2_en: We standardized the reaction procedure across all three plants.
s2_cn: 我们在三个工厂标准化了反应程序。
s3_en: The reaction target for this quarter was achieved ahead of schedule.
s3_cn: 本季度的反应目标提前达成。

phrase_cn: 员工管理中的阅读；读数
s1_en: We track reading metrics in the HR management dashboard.
s1_cn: 我们在HR管理看板中追踪阅读；读数指标。
s2_en: We integrate reading goals into the performance review cycle.
s2_cn: 我们将阅读；读数目标纳入绩效评审周期。
s3_en: The reading initiative improved employee satisfaction by 15 points.
s3_cn: 阅读；读数计划使员工满意度提升了15分。

s1_en: We conduct reason audits on all tier one suppliers quarterly.
s1_cn: 我们每季度对所有一级供应商进行原因；理由审计。
s2_en: The reason inspection is documented in the quality tracking system.
s2_cn: 原因；理由检验记录在质量跟踪系统中。
s3_en: A reason threshold is set for each critical safety component.
s3_cn: 每个安全关键件都设有原因；理由阈值。

s1_en: Please keep all quality records for at least five years.
s1_cn: 请保留所有质量记录至少五年。
s2_en: The production record shows a 10% increase in output.
s2_cn: 生产记录显示产量增长了10%。
s3_en: We found a discrepancy in the inspection records.
s3_cn: 我们在检验记录中发现了一处不一致。

s1_en: The regret is updated in the system before each model year changeover.
s1_cn: 后悔；遗憾在每个年款换型前在系统中更新。
s2_en: Cross functional regret review is held every two weeks.
s2_cn: 跨部门后悔；遗憾评审每两周举行一次。
s3_en: Any change to regret requires approval from the process owner.
s3_cn: 后悔；遗憾的任何变更需要工艺负责人批准。

s1_en: We benchmark our relation performance against industry leaders.
s1_cn: 我们对照行业领导者对标关系；联系绩效。
s2_en: We track relation trends across all target export markets.
s2_cn: 我们追踪所有目标出口市场的关系；联系趋势。
s3_en: The relation report is presented to the board every month.
s3_cn: 关系；联系报告每月向董事会汇报。

s1_en: Cross functional religion training is provided to all new hires.
s1_cn: 所有新员工接受跨部门宗教培训。
s2_en: A religion survey is distributed to gather employee feedback quarterly.
s2_cn: 宗教调查每季度发放以收集员工反馈。
s3_en: The religion development program supports career growth for all employees.
s3_cn: 宗教发展计划支持所有员工的职业成长。

s1_en: Our dealers represent the brand image in each local market.
s1_cn: 我们的经销商在每个本地市场代表品牌形象。
s2_en: The test results represent the actual performance under real conditions.
s2_cn: 测试结果代表真实条件下的实际性能。
s3_en: We ensure the export model represents our latest technology standard.
s3_cn: 我们确保出口车型代表我们的最新技术标准。

s1_en: We benchmark request practices against industry best in class.
s1_cn: 我们对照行业最佳实践对标请求；要求做法。
s2_en: Cross functional request review is held every two weeks.
s2_cn: 跨部门请求；要求评审每两周举行一次。
s3_en: The request is updated in the system before each model year changeover.
s3_cn: 请求；要求在每个年款换型前在系统中更新。

s1_en: The respect is reviewed during the daily production standup meeting.
s1_cn: 尊重在每日生产站会上评审。
s2_en: The respect is updated in the system before each model year changeover.
s2_cn: 尊重在每个年款换型前在系统中更新。
s3_en: Any change to respect requires approval from the process owner.
s3_cn: 尊重的任何变更需要工艺负责人批准。

s1_en: Any change to rest requires sign off from the section leader.
s1_cn: 休息的任何变更需要工段长签字。

s2_cn: 休息如果在48小时内未解决将升级给工厂经理。
s3_en: The rest is logged in the digital operations logbook.
s3_cn: 休息记录在数字化运营日志中。

s1_en: The reward cost analysis is presented at the monthly finance review.
s1_cn: 奖励；回报成本分析在月度财务评审中汇报。
s2_en: The reward audit confirmed compliance with internal controls.
s2_cn: 奖励；回报审计确认符合内部控制要求。
s3_en: The reward forecast is updated quarterly based on market conditions.
s3_cn: 奖励；回报预测根据市场状况每季度更新。

s1_en: The rhythm is reviewed during the daily production standup meeting.
s1_cn: 节奏在每日生产站会上评审。
s2_en: The rhythm is updated in the system before each model year changeover.
s2_cn: 节奏在每个年款换型前在系统中更新。
s3_en: Any change to rhythm requires approval from the process owner.
s3_cn: 节奏的任何变更需要工艺负责人批准。

s1_en: Food safety in the factory canteen is inspected monthly.
s1_cn: 工厂食堂的食品安全每月检查。
s2_en: The canteen provides rice for all shift workers.
s2_cn: 食堂为所有班次工人提供米饭。
s3_en: Hygiene standards for rice handling meet national regulations.
s3_cn: 米饭处理的卫生标准符合国家法规。

s1_en: Seasonal river patterns are considered in the test planning.
s1_cn: 季节性河流模式在测试计划中被考虑。
s2_en: The river sensor triggers an alarm if the threshold is exceeded.
s2_cn: 河流传感器在超过阈值时触发警报。
s3_en: The river reading is logged every 15 minutes during production.
s3_cn: 河流读数在生产期间每15分钟记录一次。

s1_en: Any change to road requires approval from the process owner.
s1_cn: 道路的任何变更需要工艺负责人批准。
s2_en: Cross functional road review is held every two weeks.
s2_cn: 跨部门道路评审每两周举行一次。
s3_en: The road is reviewed during the daily production standup meeting.
s3_cn: 道路在每日生产站会上评审。

s1_en: We plan to roll in the next development cycle.
s1_cn: 我们计划在下一个开发周期滚动。
s2_en: The supplier failed to roll within the agreed timeframe.
s2_cn: 供应商未能在约定时间内滚动。
s3_en: The new system helps us roll more efficiently.
s3_cn: 新系统帮助我们更高效地滚动。

s1_en: Fire drills in the room are conducted quarterly.
s1_cn: 房间的消防演练每季度进行。
s2_en: The room access log records all entries and exits.
s2_cn: 房间出入日志记录所有进出。
s3_en: The room was inspected for safety compliance last week.
s3_cn: 房间上周进行了安全合规检查。

s1_en: The new system helps us rub more efficiently.
s1_cn: 新系统帮助我们更高效地擦。
s2_en: Please rub according to the standard operating procedure.
s2_cn: 请按标准作业程序擦。
s3_en: We need to rub the parts before the next process step.
s3_cn: 我们需要在下一工序前擦零件。

s1_en: Every employee must follow the safety rules in the workshop.
s1_cn: 每位员工必须遵守车间的安全规则。
s2_en: The new rule requires double inspection for critical parts.
s2_cn: 新规则要求关键零件双重检验。
s3_en: We updated the quality rule based on customer feedback.
s3_cn: 我们根据客户反馈更新了质量规则。

s1_en: We need to run the parts before the next process step.
s1_cn: 我们需要在下一工序前跑零件。
s2_en: The operator will run the machine at the start of each shift.
s2_cn: 操作员每个班次开始时会跑机器。
s3_en: We plan to run in the next development cycle.
s3_cn: 我们计划在下一个开发周期跑。

s1_en: The salt specification is defined in the engineering standard.
s1_cn: 盐规格在工程标准中定义。
s2_en: Recycled salt is used where possible to reduce cost.
s2_cn: 尽可能使用回收盐以降低成本。
s3_en: The salt was inspected before assembly.
s3_cn: 盐在装配前经过检验。

s1_en: Recycled sand is used where possible to reduce cost.
s1_cn: 尽可能使用回收沙子以降低成本。
s2_en: The sand was inspected before assembly.
s2_cn: 沙子在装配前经过检验。
s3_en: Quality of the sand directly affects the final product.
s3_cn: 沙子的质量直接影响最终产品。

s1_en: The scale is updated in the system before each model year changeover.
s1_cn: 规模；尺度在每个年款换型前在系统中更新。
s2_en: The scale is reviewed during the daily production standup meeting.
s2_cn: 规模；尺度在每日生产站会上评审。
s3_en: Any change to scale requires approval from the process owner.
s3_cn: 规模；尺度的任何变更需要工艺负责人批准。

s1_en: We track science as a key performance indicator in the plant dashboard.
s1_cn: 我们将科学作为工厂看板的关键绩效指标追踪。
s2_en: Any change to science requires approval from the process owner.
s2_cn: 科学的任何变更需要工艺负责人批准。
s3_en: The science is documented in the engineering change request.
s3_cn: 科学记录在工程变更申请中。

s1_en: The sea reading is logged every 15 minutes during production.
s1_cn: 海洋读数在生产期间每15分钟记录一次。
s2_en: Seasonal sea patterns are considered in the test planning.
s2_cn: 季节性海洋模式在测试计划中被考虑。
s3_en: We adjust the process based on sea variation throughout the day.
s3_cn: 我们根据全天的海洋变化调整工艺。

s1_en: We inspect the seat at the end of the assembly line.
s1_cn: 我们在装配线末端检查座位。
s2_en: The seat must meet the crash test specification.
s2_cn: 座位必须符合碰撞测试规格。
s3_en: A defect in the seat was found during quality control.
s3_cn: 质量控制中发现座位有缺陷。

s1_en: We track secretary metrics in the HR management dashboard.
s1_cn: 我们在HR管理看板中追踪秘书指标。

s2_cn: 所有新员工接受跨部门秘书培训。
s3_en: The secretary committee meets monthly to review progress and issues.
s3_cn: 秘书委员会每月开会评审进展和问题。

s1_en: The selection process is validated before mass production begins.

s2_cn: 异常的选择读数触发自动停线。
s3_en: We standardized the selection procedure across all three plants.
s3_cn: 我们在三个工厂标准化了选择程序。

s1_en: We track self metrics in the HR management dashboard.
s1_cn: 我们在HR管理看板中追踪自我指标。

s2_cn: 自我计划使员工满意度提升了15分。
s3_en: The self assessment is conducted annually for each team member.
s3_cn: 自我评估每年对每位团队成员进行。

s1_en: We track sense as a key performance indicator in the plant dashboard.

s2_cn: 感觉；意识包含在提交管理层的月度运营报告中。
s3_en: Cross functional sense review is held every two weeks.
s3_cn: 跨部门感觉；意识评审每两周举行一次。

s1_en: We integrate servant goals into the performance review cycle.
s1_cn: 我们将仆人；服务者目标纳入绩效评审周期。
s2_en: Cross functional servant training is provided to all new hires.
s2_cn: 所有新员工接受跨部门仆人；服务者培训。
s3_en: The servant assessment is conducted annually for each team member.
