s1_en: throat prevention measures are implemented across all facilities.
s1_cn: 喉咙预防措施在所有设施中实施。
s2_en: The throat risk assessment is updated annually for each workstation.
s2_cn: 喉咙风险评估每个工位每年更新。
s3_en: We train all employees on throat procedures during onboarding.
s3_cn: 我们在入职期间培训所有员工喉咙程序。

s1_en: Please protect your thumb when handling heavy materials.
s1_cn: 搬运重型物料时请保护拇指。
s2_en: The annual health check includes a thumb examination.
s2_cn: 年度健康检查包括拇指检查。
s3_en: First aid for thumb injuries is covered in safety training.
s3_cn: 拇指伤害的急救在安全培训中涵盖。

s1_en: We benchmark our ticket performance against industry leaders.
s1_cn: 我们对照行业领导者对标票绩效。
s2_en: We analyze ticket data to optimize our dealer incentive program.
s2_cn: 我们分析票数据以优化经销商激励计划。
s3_en: A new ticket initiative will launch in the European market next year.
s3_cn: 新的票计划明年将在欧洲市场启动。

s1_en: The toe standard complies with ISO 45001 requirements.
s1_cn: 脚趾标准符合ISO 45001要求。
s2_en: The toe incident is reported to the safety committee within 24 hours.
s2_cn: 脚趾事件在24小时内报告给安全委员会。
s3_en: The toe risk assessment is updated annually for each workstation.
s3_cn: 脚趾风险评估每个工位每年更新。

s1_en: tongue protection is mandatory in the workshop area.
s1_cn: 舌头防护在工作区域是强制的。
s2_en: The safety team checks tongue injury reports monthly.
s2_cn: 安全团队每月检查舌头伤害报告。
s3_en: Ergonomic design reduces tongue strain for assembly workers.
s3_cn: 人体工程学设计减少装配工人的舌头劳损。

s1_en: The safety team checks tooth injury reports monthly.
s1_cn: 安全团队每月检查牙齿伤害报告。
s2_en: Ergonomic design reduces tooth strain for assembly workers.
s2_cn: 人体工程学设计减少装配工人的牙齿劳损。
s3_en: Please protect your tooth when handling heavy materials.
s3_cn: 搬运重型物料时请保护牙齿。

s1_en: Emergency exits in the town are tested monthly.
s1_cn: 城镇的紧急出口每月测试。
s2_en: The town safety audit identified three improvement areas.
s2_cn: 城镇安全审核发现了三个改进领域。
s3_en: Fire drills in the town are conducted quarterly.
s3_cn: 城镇的消防演练每季度进行。

s1_en: We track train as a key performance indicator in the plant dashboard.
s1_cn: 我们将火车作为工厂看板的关键绩效指标追踪。
s2_en: Any change to train requires approval from the process owner.
s2_cn: 火车的任何变更需要工艺负责人批准。
s3_en: The train is included in the monthly operations report to management.
s3_cn: 火车包含在提交管理层的月度运营报告中。

s1_en: Parts trays are organized by part number and color coded for identification.
s1_cn: 零件托盘按零件号组织并用颜色编码标识。
s2_en: We scan each tray barcode before loading parts onto the assembly line.
s2_cn: 我们在将零件装载到装配线前扫描每个托盘条码。
s3_en: The tray return system ensures empty containers are recycled to suppliers.
s3_cn: 托盘回收系统确保空容器回收到供应商。

s1_en: The tree reading is logged every 15 minutes during production.
s1_cn: 树读数在生产期间每15分钟记录一次。
s2_en: Extreme tree conditions are tested in the climate chamber.
s2_cn: 极端树条件在气候舱中测试。
s3_en: We monitor tree conditions in the paint booth continuously.
s3_cn: 我们持续监控喷漆室的树条件。

s1_en: Suppliers must provide trousers test reports with each shipment.
s1_cn: 供应商每次出货必须提供裤子测试报告。
s2_en: The trousers property is documented in the material data sheet.
s2_cn: 裤子性能记录在材料数据表中。
s3_en: The trousers material spec is verified at incoming inspection.
s3_cn: 裤子材料规格在来料检验时验证。

s1_en: We monitor umbrella conditions in the paint booth continuously.
s1_cn: 我们持续监控喷漆室的雨伞条件。
s2_en: Extreme umbrella conditions are tested in the climate chamber.
s2_cn: 极端雨伞条件在气候舱中测试。
s3_en: We adjust the process based on umbrella variation throughout the day.
s3_cn: 我们根据全天的雨伞变化调整工艺。

s1_en: The wall must meet the crash test specification.
s1_cn: 墙必须符合碰撞测试规格。
s2_en: A defect in the wall was found during quality control.
s2_cn: 质量控制中发现墙有缺陷。
s3_en: The wall assembly was optimized for faster production.
s3_cn: 墙装配经过优化以加快生产。

s1_en: We track watch as a key performance indicator in the plant dashboard.
s1_cn: 我们将手表作为工厂看板的关键绩效指标追踪。
s2_en: The watch is documented in the engineering change request.
s2_cn: 手表记录在工程变更申请中。
s3_en: The watch is reviewed during the daily production standup meeting.
s3_cn: 手表在每日生产站会上评审。

s1_en: Please check the wheel alignment after tire replacement.
s1_cn: 更换轮胎后请检查车轮定位。
s2_en: The wheel supplier passed our durability test.
s2_cn: 轮毂供应商通过了我们的耐久性测试。
s3_en: We use alloy wheels for the premium model line.
s3_cn: 高端车型线使用合金轮毂。

s1_en: The whip antenna is mounted on the roof for radio reception.
s1_cn: 鞭状天线安装在车顶用于无线电接收。
s2_en: We test the whip antenna for signal strength in the EMC chamber.
s2_cn: 我们在EMC暗室中测试鞭状天线的信号强度。
s3_en: The whip mount must withstand vibration testing per the vehicle spec.
s3_cn: 鞭状天线安装座必须按车辆规格通过振动测试。

s1_en: A wind whistle at high speed indicates a door seal issue.
s1_cn: 高速时的风哨声表明车门密封问题。
s2_en: We test for wind whistle in the aerodynamic wind tunnel.
s2_cn: 我们在空气动力学风洞中测试风哨声。
s3_en: The whistle noise from the mirror was eliminated by design change.
s3_cn: 后视镜的哨声通过设计变更消除。

s1_en: We inspect the window at the end of the assembly line.
s1_cn: 我们在装配线末端检查窗户。
s2_en: The window must meet the crash test specification.
s2_cn: 窗户必须符合碰撞测试规格。
s3_en: A defect in the window was found during quality control.
s3_cn: 质量控制中发现窗户有缺陷。

s1_en: The wing must meet the crash test specification.
s1_cn: 翅膀必须符合碰撞测试规格。
s2_en: A defect in the wing was found during quality control.
s2_cn: 质量控制中发现翅膀有缺陷。
s3_en: The wing assembly was optimized for faster production.
s3_cn: 翅膀装配经过优化以加快生产。

s1_en: Recycled wire is used where possible to reduce cost.
s1_cn: 尽可能使用回收电线以降低成本。
s2_en: The wire was inspected before assembly.
s2_cn: 电线在装配前经过检验。
s3_en: Quality of the wire directly affects the final product.
s3_cn: 电线的质量直接影响最终产品。

s1_en: The worm repellent coating protects vehicle wiring.
s1_cn: 防虫子涂层保护车辆线路。
s2_en: No worm by-products are used in any vehicle component.
s2_cn: 任何车辆零件都不使用虫子副产品。
s3_en: Animal testing is not used in our product development.
s3_cn: 我们的产品开发不使用动物测试。

s1_en: The operator must be able to read engineering drawings.
s1_cn: 操作员必须能够识读工程图纸。
s2_en: Our system is able to track parts through the entire supply chain.
s2_cn: 我们的系统能够在整个供应链中追踪零件。
s3_en: We ensure all workers are able to identify safety hazards.
s3_cn: 我们确保所有工人能够识别安全隐患。

s1_en: The acid-resistant coating protects the battery casing from corrosion.
s1_cn: 耐酸涂层保护电池外壳免受腐蚀。
s2_en: We test the acid resistance of all underbody components.
s2_cn: 我们测试所有车身底部零件的耐酸性。
s3_en: Acid-neutralizing materials are required in the battery compartment.
s3_cn: 电池舱需要使用酸中和材料。

s1_en: An angry customer call triggered an immediate quality investigation.
s1_cn: 愤怒的客户来电触发了立即的质量调查。
s2_en: We address angry feedback from dealers within 24 hours.
s2_cn: 我们在24小时内处理经销商的不满反馈。
s3_en: The angry tone of the supplier meeting indicated a serious delivery issue.
s3_cn: 供应商会议中的不满语气表明存在严重的交付问题。

s1_en: The automatic transmission shifts smoothly under all load conditions.
s1_cn: 自动变速箱在所有负载条件下换挡平顺。
s2_en: We installed an automatic welding system on Line 2.
s2_cn: 我们在2号线安装了自动焊接系统。
s3_en: The automatic inspection reduced human error by 80%.
s3_cn: 自动检测减少了80%的人为错误。

s1_en: The beautiful exterior design won the industry design award.
s1_cn: 优美的外观设计获得了行业设计奖。
s2_en: A beautiful surface finish requires proper paint preparation.
s2_cn: 优美的表面处理需要适当的喷漆准备。
s3_en: We maintain beautiful panel gaps as a sign of build quality.
s3_cn: 我们保持优美的面板间隙作为制造品质的标志。

s1_en: The black exterior color is popular in the European market.
s1_cn: 黑色外观在欧洲市场很受欢迎。
s2_en: We verify the black paint consistency across all body panels.
s2_cn: 我们验证所有车身面板的黑色漆面一致性。
s3_en: The black interior option is available for the premium trim.
s3_cn: 黑色内饰选项适用于高配车型。

s1_en: The boiling point of the brake fluid is tested every service interval.
s1_cn: 刹车液的沸点在每个保养周期测试。
s2_en: Boiling coolant indicates a potential cooling system failure.
s2_cn: 冷却液沸腾表明冷却系统可能存在故障。
s3_en: We verify the boiling temperature range of all process fluids.
s3_cn: 我们验证所有工艺流体的沸点范围。

s1_en: The bright finish trim is applied to the grille and door handles.
s1_cn: 亮面装饰应用于格栅和门把手。
s2_en: Bright LED headlights improve visibility in low light conditions.
s2_cn: 明亮的LED大灯提升了低光条件下的能见度。
s3_en: We verify the bright surface for scratches before final assembly.
s3_cn: 我们在总装前检查亮面表面是否有划痕。

s1_en: Broken parts must be tagged and removed from the production line immediately.
s1_cn: 损坏零件必须立即标记并从生产线移除。
s2_en: A broken tool triggers an automatic machine stop.
s2_cn: 断裂工具会触发机器自动停机。
s3_en: We log all broken component incidents in the tracking system.
s3_cn: 我们将所有损坏零件事件记录在跟踪系统中。

s1_en: The brown leather seat is standard on the luxury model.
s1_cn: 棕色皮革座椅是豪华车型的标配。
s2_en: Customers can choose a brown dashboard trim package.
s2_cn: 客户可选择棕色仪表台装饰包。
s3_en: The brown color code must match the interior specification.
s3_cn: 棕色代码必须与内饰规格一致。

s1_en: We found a cost effective alternative without compromising quality.
s1_cn: 我们找到了不降低质量的高性价比替代方案。
s2_en: The supplier offered a more competitive price for bulk orders.
s2_cn: 供应商对大宗订单提供了更有竞争力的价格。
s3_en: Cheap labor is not a strategy we pursue for quality products.
s3_cn: 廉价劳动力不是我们制造高质量产品的策略。

s1_en: The chemical resistance of interior materials is tested per ISO standard.
s1_cn: 内饰材料的耐化学性按ISO标准测试。
s2_en: Chemical analysis of the coolant is performed every 500 hours.
s2_cn: 冷却液的化学分析每500小时进行一次。
s3_en: We verify the chemical composition of each raw material batch.
s3_cn: 我们验证每批原材料的化学成分。

s1_en: The chief engineer must approve all design changes.
s1_cn: 总工程师必须审批所有设计变更。
s2_en: A chief inspector reviews the final quality audit report.
s2_cn: 首席检查员评审最终质量审计报告。
s3_en: The chief financial officer approved the equipment investment.
s3_cn: 首席财务官批准了设备投资。

s1_en: The clean room standard is required for electronic component assembly.
s1_cn: 电子零件装配需要洁净室标准。
s2_en: We maintain a clean work environment to prevent contamination.
s2_cn: 我们保持清洁的工作环境以防止污染。
s3_en: Clean parts are essential for proper adhesive bonding.
s3_cn: 清洁零件对于正确的粘合至关重要。

s1_en: A clear quality standard must be communicated to all suppliers.
s1_cn: 清晰的质量标准必须传达给所有供应商。
s2_en: We maintain clear documentation for all engineering changes.
s2_cn: 我们为所有工程变更保持清晰的文档。
s3_en: Clear labeling on parts prevents assembly errors.
s3_cn: 零件上的清晰标签防止装配错误。

s1_en: The common platform strategy reduces development and tooling costs.
s1_cn: 通用平台策略降低了开发和工装成本。
s2_en: Common parts are shared across multiple vehicle models.
s2_cn: 通用零件在多个车型间共享。
s3_en: We address common failure modes in the FMEA analysis.
s3_cn: 我们在FMEA分析中处理常见失效模式。

s1_en: The complex assembly operation requires skilled operators.
s1_cn: 复杂装配操作需要熟练的操作员。
s2_en: A complex wiring harness routes through 15 connection points.
s2_cn: 复杂的线束穿过15个连接点。
s3_en: We simplify complex processes through continuous improvement.
s3_cn: 我们通过持续改进简化复杂工艺。

s1_en: A safety conscious culture is promoted throughout the plant.
s1_cn: 全厂推行安全意识文化。
s2_en: Cost conscious engineering decisions are reviewed monthly.
s2_cn: 成本意识的工程决策每月评审。
s3_en: We train operators to be quality conscious at every workstation.
s3_cn: 我们培训操作员在每个工位保持质量意识。

s1_en: The cut edge tolerance must be within 0.2 mm of the nominal.
s1_cn: 切割边公差必须在标称值0.2毫米以内。
s2_en: We inspect cut surfaces for burrs and roughness.
s2_cn: 我们检查切割面的毛刺和粗糙度。
s3_en: The cut depth of the groove is measured with a depth gauge.
s3_cn: 槽的切割深度用深度计测量。

s1_en: The deep draw stamping process is used for body panel forming.
s1_cn: 深拉冲压工艺用于车身面板成型。
s2_en: A deep channel in the frame provides routing for wiring.
s2_cn: 车架上的深槽为线路布设提供通道。
s3_en: We test the deep cycle battery performance for EV applications.
s3_cn: 我们测试深循环电池在电动汽车上的性能。

s1_en: We are dependent on a single supplier for the battery cells.
s1_cn: 我们的电池电芯依赖单一供应商。
s2_en: The production schedule is dependent on timely material delivery.
s2_cn: 生产计划依赖于及时的物料交付。
s3_en: We reduce dependent sourcing by developing second sources.
s3_cn: 我们通过开发第二供应商来减少依赖性采购。

s1_en: An early warning system detects bearing wear before failure.
s1_cn: 预警系统在失效前检测到轴承磨损。
s2_en: Early supplier involvement improves the design for manufacturability.
s2_cn: 供应商早期参与改善了可制造性设计。
s3_en: We conduct early testing to catch issues before mass production.
s3_cn: 我们进行早期测试以在量产前发现问题。

s1_en: The elastic seal must withstand 100,000 temperature cycles.
s1_cn: 弹性密封件必须承受10万次温度循环。
s2_en: Elastic materials are used in the door weather stripping.
s2_cn: 弹性材料用于车门密封条。
s3_en: We test the elastic recovery rate of all rubber components.
s3_cn: 我们测试所有橡胶零件的弹性恢复率。

s1_en: The electric vehicle platform supports multiple body styles.
s1_cn: 电动车型平台支持多种车身样式。
s2_en: Electric motor suppliers must meet our quality certification.
s2_cn: 电机供应商必须满足我们的质量认证。
s3_en: The electric powertrain reduces maintenance costs by 40%.
s3_cn: 电动动力总成降低40%的维护成本。

s1_en: All suppliers must meet the equal quality standard for incoming parts.
s1_cn: 所有供应商必须满足来件统一质量标准。
s2_en: Equal distribution of workload across stations improves efficiency.
s2_cn: 工位间均衡的工作量分配提升了效率。
s3_en: We ensure equal opportunity in our hiring and training programs.
s3_cn: 我们确保招聘和培训计划中的平等机会。

s1_en: The fatigue test runs for 500,000 cycles on suspension parts.
s1_cn: 悬挂零件的疲劳测试运行50万次循环。
s2_en: We monitor fatigue cracks in the chassis during testing.
s2_cn: 测试中我们监控底盘的疲劳裂纹。
s3_en: Fatigue life prediction is based on CAE simulation data.
s3_cn: 疲劳寿命预测基于CAE仿真数据。

s1_en: The design team generated fertile ideas for the new interior concept.
s1_cn: 设计团队为新内饰概念产生了丰富的创意。
s2_en: A fertile product pipeline ensures long term market competitiveness.
s2_cn: 丰富的产品线确保长期市场竞争力。
s3_en: We encourage fertile brainstorming sessions during the concept phase.
s3_cn: 我们在概念阶段鼓励富有创意的头脑风暴。

s1_en: The first article inspection is required before mass production starts.
s1_cn: 量产开始前需要首件检验。
s2_en: We track the first off parts from each production run.
s2_cn: 我们追踪每批生产的首件。
s3_en: The first batch data is reviewed by the engineering team.
s3_cn: 首批数据由工程团队评审。

s1_en: Fixed costs include plant depreciation and equipment maintenance.
s1_cn: 固定成本包括工厂折旧和设备维护。
s2_en: A fixed torque wrench is calibrated every 5,000 cycles.
s2_cn: 定扭矩扳手每5,000次循环校准一次。
s3_en: We use fixed scheduling to stabilize the production plan.
s3_cn: 我们使用固定排程来稳定生产计划。

s1_en: The flat surface tolerance for the mounting plate is 0.1 mm.
s1_cn: 安装板的平面度公差为0.1毫米。
s2_en: We verify the flat alignment of the engine mounting surface.
s2_cn: 我们验证发动机安装面的平整对齐。
s3_en: A flat gasket ensures proper sealing between flanges.
s3_cn: 平整的密封垫片确保法兰之间正确密封。

s1_en: We aim for defect free output on every production line.
s1_cn: 我们的目标是每条产线零缺陷产出。
s2_en: The maintenance free battery reduces service costs for customers.
s2_cn: 免维护电池降低了客户的保养成本。
s3_en: Lead free solder is required for all electronic assemblies.
s3_cn: 所有电子装配要求无铅焊料。

s1_en: Frequent quality audits ensure consistent process compliance.
s1_cn: 频繁的质量审计确保持续的工艺合规。
s2_en: We hold frequent review meetings with key suppliers.
s2_cn: 我们与关键供应商定期召开评审会议。
s3_en: Frequent calibration checks prevent measurement drift.
s3_cn: 频繁的校准检查防止测量漂移。

s1_en: The full load test validates the engine performance at maximum output.
s1_cn: 满载测试验证发动机在最大输出时的性能。
s2_en: A full inspection is required before releasing the batch.
s2_cn: 批次放行前需要全面检查。
s3_en: We operate at full capacity during the peak production season.
s3_cn: 我们在生产旺季满负荷运转。

s1_en: The general quality guideline applies to all production sites.
s1_cn: 通用质量指南适用于所有生产工厂。
s2_en: A general audit covers the full quality management system.
s2_cn: 通用审计覆盖整个质量管理体系。
s3_en: We provide general orientation training to all new hires.
s3_cn: 我们为所有新员工提供通用入职培训。

s1_en: Good manufacturing practice is mandatory for all production sites.
s1_cn: 良好制造规范是所有生产工厂的强制要求。
s2_en: We maintain good relationships with our tier one suppliers.
s2_cn: 我们与一级供应商保持良好关系。
s3_en: A good finish quality is verified at the final inspection station.
s3_cn: 终检工位验证良好的表面质量。

s1_en: The great product launch exceeded our sales target by 20 percent.
s1_cn: 成功的产品上市超出销售目标20%。
s2_en: We achieved great results in the latest customer satisfaction survey.
s2_cn: 我们在最新的客户满意度调查中取得了优异成绩。
s3_en: Great teamwork between engineering and production ensured a smooth ramp up.
s3_cn: 工程和生产之间的卓越团队合作确保了顺利爬产。

s1_en: Grey is the most popular exterior color in the fleet segment.
s1_cn: 灰色是车队市场最受欢迎的外观颜色。
s2_en: The grey paint code is documented in the color matrix.
s2_cn: 灰色漆面代码记录在颜色矩阵中。
s3_en: We inspect the grey finish for uniformity and gloss.
s3_cn: 我们检查灰色面漆的均匀度和光泽度。

s1_en: The hanging fixture supports the body during the paint process.
s1_cn: 悬挂式夹具在喷漆过程中支撑车身。
s2_en: Hanging parts on the conveyor move through each process station.
s2_cn: 悬挂在输送带上的零件依次通过各工位。
s3_en: We inspect the hanging assembly for proper alignment.
s3_cn: 我们检查悬挂式装配的对齐情况。

s1_en: Our happy customer index improved by 12 points this year.
s1_cn: 我们的客户满意度指数今年提升了12分。
s2_en: We aim to keep dealers happy with timely delivery and support.
s2_cn: 我们通过及时交付和支持让经销商满意。
s3_en: The happy team environment contributes to lower turnover rates.
s3_cn: 愉悦的团队环境有助于降低离职率。

s1_en: The hard coating on the lens must pass the scratch test.
s1_cn: 透镜上的硬质涂层必须通过划痕测试。
s2_en: Hard steel is required for all load-bearing structural parts.
s2_cn: 所有承重结构件需要使用硬质钢。
s3_en: We measure the hard surface thickness at three points per part.
s3_cn: 我们每个零件测量三个点的硬表面厚度。

s1_en: A healthy cash flow allows us to invest in new equipment.
s1_cn: 健康的现金流使我们能够投资新设备。
s2_en: We maintain a healthy inventory level to avoid stockouts.
s2_cn: 我们保持健康的库存水平以避免缺料。
s3_en: A healthy supplier relationship is built on trust and transparency.
s3_cn: 健康的供应商关系建立在信任和透明之上。

s1_en: The high performance variant features a turbocharged engine.
s1_cn: 高性能变体配备涡轮增压发动机。
s2_en: High strength steel is used in the crash structure.
s2_cn: 碰撞结构中使用高强度钢。
s3_en: We maintain high quality standards across all production lines.
s3_cn: 我们在所有产线保持高质量标准。

s1_en: The hollow structural tube reduces weight while maintaining strength.
s1_cn: 空心结构管在减轻重量的同时保持强度。
s2_en: Hollow sections are used in the chassis for weight optimization.
s2_cn: 底盘使用空心截面以优化重量。
s3_en: We inspect the hollow profile for wall thickness consistency.
s3_cn: 我们检查空心型材的壁厚一致性。

s1_en: Airbags are an important safety feature in all our vehicles.
s1_cn: 安全气囊是我们所有车辆的重要安全特性。
s2_en: It is important to follow the torque sequence during assembly.
s2_cn: 装配时遵循扭矩顺序很重要。
s3_en: We prioritize important quality issues based on risk assessment.
s3_cn: 我们根据风险评估对重要质量问题排序。

s1_en: Each kind of material requires a specific handling procedure.
s1_cn: 每种材料类别需要特定的处理程序。
s2_en: We sort parts by kind during the incoming inspection.
s2_cn: 来料检验时我们按类别分拣零件。
s3_en: What kind of defect was found in the latest batch?
s3_cn: 最新批次中发现了哪种缺陷？

s1_en: A like for like replacement ensures the spare part meets the same spec.
s1_cn: 同规格替换确保备件满足相同规格。
s2_en: We compare like for like when benchmarking against competitors.
s2_cn: 对标竞争对手时我们进行同规格对比。
s3_en: The supplier must provide like samples for the PPAP submission.
s3_cn: 供应商必须为PPAP提交提供同类样品。

s1_en: Living standard improvements are tracked in the community impact report.
s1_cn: 生活水平提升在社区影响报告中跟踪。
s2_en: The living wage policy applies to all workers in the supply chain.
s2_cn: 生活工资政策适用于供应链中的所有工人。
s3_en: We assess living conditions at supplier dormitories annually.
s3_cn: 我们每年评估供应商宿舍的居住条件。

s1_en: The long term durability test runs for 100,000 kilometers.
s1_cn: 长期耐久性测试持续10万公里。
s2_en: A long wheelbase provides a smoother ride quality.
s2_cn: 长轴距提供更平顺的行驶品质。
s3_en: We plan for long term supply agreements with key vendors.
s3_cn: 我们与关键供应商计划长期供应协议。

s1_en: The male thread specification must match the female fitting.
s1_cn: 阳螺纹规格必须与阴螺纹接头匹配。
s2_en: The male connector is sealed with an O ring before assembly.
s2_cn: 阳接头在装配前用O型圈密封。
s3_en: We verify the male fitting dimensions with a thread gauge.
s3_cn: 我们用螺纹量规验证阳接头尺寸。

s1_en: Employee marital status is updated in the HR system annually.
s1_cn: 员工婚姻状况每年在HR系统中更新。
s2_en: The benefits package covers married employees and their families.
s2_cn: 福利方案覆盖已婚员工及其家属。
s3_en: We do not consider married status in shift assignment decisions.
s3_cn: 排班决策中不考虑婚姻状况。

s1_en: The material safety data sheet must accompany all chemical shipments.
s1_cn: 材料安全数据表必须随所有化学货物一起运输。
s2_en: Material traceability is maintained from receiving to final assembly.
s2_cn: 材料可追溯性从收料到总装全程保持。
s3_en: We verify the material certificate for each steel coil delivery.
s3_cn: 我们验证每卷钢卷交付的材料证书。

s1_en: A medical emergency kit is available at every production station.
s1_cn: 每个生产工位都配备医疗急救包。
s2_en: Medical certification is required for operators handling hazardous materials.
s2_cn: 处理危险材料的操作员需要医疗认证。
s3_en: We provide annual medical checkups for all plant employees.
s3_cn: 我们为所有工厂员工提供年度体检。

s1_en: Military grade components are used in the communication system.
s1_cn: 通信系统使用军工级零件。
s2_en: The military specification for vibration resistance is our benchmark.
s2_cn: 军用抗震规格是我们的基准。
s3_en: We apply military grade testing to off road vehicle components.
s3_cn: 我们对越野车辆零件执行军工级测试。

s1_en: Natural rubber seals are used for their superior elasticity.
s1_cn: 天然橡胶密封件因其优异的弹性而被使用。
s2_en: The natural frequency of the suspension is tuned for ride comfort.
s2_cn: 悬挂的固有频率为行驶舒适性而调校。
s3_en: We reduce natural resource consumption in the painting process.
s3_cn: 我们在喷漆工艺中减少自然资源消耗。

s1_en: Necessary corrective actions are identified in the root cause analysis.
s1_cn: 根本原因分析中识别必要的纠正措施。
s2_en: It is necessary to obtain management approval before changing the process.
s2_cn: 变更工艺前必须获得管理层批准。
s3_en: We determine the necessary resources for each new model program.
s3_cn: 我们确定每个新车型项目的必要资源。

s1_en: The new model launch is scheduled for the third quarter.
s1_cn: 新车型上市计划在第三季度。
s2_en: New tooling installation is completed during the summer shutdown.
s2_cn: 新工装安装在夏季停线期间完成。
s3_en: We train operators on new procedures before the production ramp up.
s3_cn: 我们在产能爬坡前培训操作员新程序。

s1_en: The engine operates within normal temperature and pressure ranges.
s1_cn: 发动机在正常温度和压力范围内运行。
s2_en: Normal production resumed after the equipment was recalibrated.
s2_cn: 设备重新校准后恢复正常生产。
s3_en: We verify the normal flow rate of coolant in the test cycle.
s3_cn: 我们在测试循环中验证冷却液的正常流量。

s1_en: All open issues must be resolved before the design freeze.
s1_cn: 所有未结问题在设计冻结前必须解决。
s2_en: An open recall campaign affects 5,000 vehicles in the field.
s2_cn: 一项未结召回活动影响5,000辆在用车辆。
s3_en: We maintain an open communication channel with all key suppliers.
s3_cn: 我们与所有关键供应商保持开放的沟通渠道。

s1_en: The parallel production line allows simultaneous assembly of two models.
s1_cn: 并行生产线允许同时装配两种车型。
s2_en: We run parallel testing on multiple prototypes to save development time.
s2_cn: 我们对多个原型进行并行测试以节省开发时间。
s3_en: Parallel imports are monitored to protect the authorized dealer network.
s3_cn: 我们监控平行进口以保护授权经销商网络。

s1_en: Past performance records are reviewed during supplier evaluation.
s1_cn: 供应商评估时评审历史绩效记录。
s2_en: We analyze past warranty data to identify recurring issues.
s2_cn: 我们分析历史保修数据以识别反复出现的问题。
s3_en: The past defect trend helps us predict future quality risks.
s3_cn: 历史缺陷趋势帮助我们预测未来质量风险。

s1_en: The physical properties of the material are tested per ASTM standard.
s1_cn: 材料的物理性能按ASTM标准测试。
s2_en: A physical inventory count is performed at the end of each quarter.
s2_cn: 每季度末进行实物盘点。
s3_en: We verify the physical dimensions of every sample part.
s3_cn: 我们验证每个样品零件的物理尺寸。

s1_en: A political risk assessment is conducted for each export market.
s1_cn: 每个出口市场都进行政治风险评估。
s2_en: Political stability in the target country affects our investment plan.
s2_cn: 目标国家的政治稳定性影响我们的投资计划。
s3_en: We monitor political trade policies that impact automotive exports.
s3_cn: 我们监控影响汽车出口的政治贸易政策。

s1_en: A poor quality alert triggers an immediate containment action.
s1_cn: 质量不良预警触发立即遏制行动。
s2_en: We address poor weld penetration by adjusting the robot parameters.
s2_cn: 我们通过调整机器人参数解决焊接熔深不足的问题。
s3_en: Poor supplier performance is documented in the monthly scorecard.
s3_cn: 供应商表现不佳记录在月度记分卡中。

s1_en: All possible failure modes are documented in the FMEA.
s1_cn: 所有可能的失效模式记录在FMEA中。
s2_en: We identify possible risks in the supply chain before they occur.
s2_cn: 我们在供应链风险发生前进行识别。
s3_en: It is possible to increase capacity by adding a second shift.
s3_cn: 增加第二个班次可以提升产能。

s1_en: The present status of the project is green on all milestones.
s1_cn: 项目当前状态在所有里程碑上均为绿色。
s2_en: We review the present production rate during the daily standup.
s2_cn: 我们在每日站会上评审当前生产率。
s3_en: The present inventory level is sufficient for two weeks of production.
s3_cn: 当前库存水平足以支撑两周生产。

s1_en: The private label brand is sold exclusively through our dealer network.
s1_cn: 自有品牌仅通过我们的经销商网络销售。
s2_en: Private labeling agreements are negotiated with each OEM partner.
s2_cn: 自有品牌协议与每个OEM合作伙伴单独谈判。
s3_en: We protect private intellectual property through patent filings.
s3_cn: 我们通过专利申请保护自有知识产权。

s1_en: The probable failure cause was identified as material fatigue.
s1_cn: 可能的失效原因被识别为材料疲劳。
s2_en: We assess probable risks in the supply chain contingency plan.
s2_cn: 我们在供应链应急计划中评估可能的风险。
s3_en: The probable root cause is confirmed through additional testing.
s3_cn: 可能的根本原因通过附加测试确认。

s1_en: A quick response team resolves production line issues within 30 minutes.
s1_cn: 快速响应团队在30分钟内解决产线问题。
s2_en: We provide quick feedback to suppliers on quality concerns.
s2_cn: 我们向供应商快速反馈质量问题。
s3_en: Quick changeover between models improves line utilization.
s3_cn: 车型间的快速换型提升了产线利用率。

s1_en: The quiet cabin design uses acoustic glass and sound deadening material.
s1_cn: 静谧座舱设计使用隔音玻璃和吸音材料。
s2_en: A quiet working environment improves operator concentration.
s2_cn: 安静的工作环境提升操作员注意力。
s3_en: We measure the quiet operation level of electric motors in the test cell.
s3_cn: 我们在测试间测量电机的安静运行水平。

s1_en: The vehicle is ready for shipment after passing all quality gates.
s1_cn: 车辆通过所有质量门后即可出货。
s2_en: We confirm the production line is ready before the morning shift starts.
s2_cn: 早班开始前我们确认产线就绪。
s3_en: Ready parts are staged in the assembly area for just in time delivery.
s3_cn: 就绪零件放置在装配区以实现准时交付。

s1_en: A red light on the dashboard indicates a critical system fault.
s1_cn: 仪表盘上的红灯表示关键系统故障。
s2_en: The red color code is reserved for safety warning labels.
s2_cn: 红色代码保留用于安全警示标签。
s3_en: Red marking on the floor separates the hazard zone from the work area.
s3_cn: 地面上的红色标记将危险区与工作区隔开。

s1_en: Regular maintenance is scheduled every 10,000 production cycles.
s1_cn: 定期维护每10,000次生产循环安排一次。
s2_en: We conduct regular safety inspections on all lifting equipment.
s2_cn: 我们对所有吊装设备进行定期安全检查。
s3_en: Regular calibration of measurement tools is tracked in the quality system.
s3_cn: 测量工具的定期校准在质量系统中跟踪。

s1_en: The responsible department head must sign the change request.
s1_cn: 责任部门负责人必须签署变更申请。
s2_en: We assign a responsible engineer to each supplier quality issue.
s2_cn: 我们为每个供应商质量问题指定责任工程师。
s3_en: The responsible team is accountable for the root cause analysis.
s3_cn: 责任团队对根本原因分析负责。

s1_en: The right first time approach reduces rework and waste significantly.
s1_cn: 一次做对的方法显著减少返工和废料。
s2_en: We ensure the right torque is applied on every critical fastener.
s2_cn: 我们确保每个关键紧固件施加正确的扭矩。
s3_en: Getting the right material specification is essential for crash safety.
s3_cn: 获得正确的材料规格对碰撞安全至关重要。

s1_en: The round cross section of the pipe ensures uniform flow.
s1_cn: 管道的圆形截面确保均匀流动。
s2_en: We measure the round tolerance of all machined shafts.
s2_cn: 我们测量所有加工轴的圆度公差。
s3_en: Round seals are used in all hydraulic connections.
s3_cn: 所有液压连接使用圆形密封件。

s1_en: All production sites follow the same quality standard.
s1_cn: 所有生产工厂遵循统一的质量标准。
s2_en: The same part number is used across all vehicle platforms.
s2_cn: 所有车型平台使用相同的零件号。
s3_en: We maintain the same delivery schedule for domestic and export orders.
s3_cn: 我们对国内和出口订单保持相同的交付计划。

s1_en: We are developing a second source supplier for the chip module.
s1_cn: 我们正在为芯片模块开发第二供应商。
s2_en: The second shift operation runs from 4 PM to midnight.
s2_cn: 第二班次运营时间为下午4点到午夜。
s3_en: A second inspection is performed on all safety critical parts.
s3_cn: 所有安全关键件进行二次检验。

s1_en: Defective parts are stored in a separate area to prevent mix ups.
s1_cn: 缺陷零件存放在独立区域以防止混料。
s2_en: We maintain separate inventory codes for domestic and export parts.
s2_cn: 我们为国内和出口零件保持独立的库存代码。
s3_en: The quarantine zone is separate from the main warehouse.
s3_cn: 隔离区与主仓库分开。

s1_en: A serious safety incident triggers an immediate plant wide stop.
s1_cn: 严重安全事故触发全厂立即停线。
s2_en: We investigate serious quality escapes with a cross functional team.
s2_cn: 我们用跨部门团队调查严重的质量逃逸。
s3_en: Serious supplier violations result in immediate disqualification.
s3_cn: 严重的供应商违规导致立即取消资格。

s1_en: Sharp edges on metal parts must be deburred before assembly.
s1_cn: 金属零件上的锐边在装配前必须去毛刺。
s2_en: We check for sharp burrs on all stamped components.
s2_cn: 我们检查所有冲压件上的锐边毛刺。
s3_en: Sharp corners are rounded to meet the safety standard.
s3_cn: 锐角被倒圆角以满足安全标准。

s1_en: The smooth surface finish reduces aerodynamic drag.
s1_cn: 光滑的表面处理降低了空气阻力。
s2_en: A smooth coating is applied to prevent corrosion on metal parts.
s2_cn: 金属零件上涂有光滑涂层以防止腐蚀。
s3_en: We inspect the smooth texture of all painted surfaces.
s3_cn: 我们检查所有喷漆表面的光滑纹理。

s1_en: Sticky residue on the surface must be removed before painting.
s1_cn: 表面的粘性残留物必须在喷漆前清除。
s2_en: The sticky tape is used to mask areas during the paint process.
s2_cn: 粘性胶带用于喷漆过程中的遮蔽。
s3_en: We check for sticky contaminants on all machined surfaces.
s3_cn: 我们检查所有加工表面的粘性污染物。

s1_en: The stiff suspension is tuned for high-speed stability.
s1_cn: 硬悬挂调校用于高速稳定性。
s2_en: A stiff chassis frame reduces body roll during cornering.
s2_cn: 硬质底盘车架减少了转弯时的车身侧倾。
s3_en: We test the stiff response of the steering system at various speeds.
s3_cn: 我们测试转向系统在不同速度下的硬响应。

s1_en: The straight edge measurement must be within 0.05 mm tolerance.
s1_cn: 直线度测量必须在0.05毫米公差范围内。
s2_en: We verify the straight alignment of the body frame rails.
s2_cn: 我们验证车身纵梁的直线对齐。
s3_en: A straight weld seam indicates proper robot programming.
s3_cn: 笔直的焊缝表明机器人编程正确。

s1_en: A strong adhesive is required for windshield installation.
s1_cn: 挡风玻璃安装需要使用强力粘合剂。
s2_en: The strong weld joint must pass the tensile strength test.
s2_cn: 强力焊接接头必须通过拉伸强度测试。
s3_en: We ensure the strong structural support meets the load requirement.
s3_cn: 我们确保强力结构支撑满足载荷要求。

s1_en: A sudden failure in the stamping press halted production for 3 hours.
s1_cn: 冲压机的突发失效使生产停机3小时。
s2_en: We monitor for sudden changes in the machine vibration pattern.
s2_cn: 我们监控机器振动模式的突然变化。
s3_en: The sudden temperature drop affected the paint curing process.
s3_cn: 突然的温度下降影响了油漆固化工艺。

s1_en: The sweet spot for injection pressure minimizes flash and short shots.
s1_cn: 注塑压力的最优区间减少了飞边和缺胶。
s2_en: We find the sweet spot between speed and quality in the welding parameters.
s2_cn: 我们在焊接参数中找到速度与质量的最优平衡点。
s3_en: The sweet spot in the press tonnage ensures consistent formability.
s3_cn: 冲压吨位的最优区间确保一致的成型性。

s1_en: The tall ride height is designed for off-road capability.
s1_cn: 高离地间隙专为越野能力设计。
s2_en: Tall drivers require adjustable seat and steering column.
s2_cn: 高个子驾驶员需要可调座椅和转向柱。
s3_en: We offer a tall roof option for increased cargo capacity.
s3_cn: 我们提供高顶选项以增加载货容量。

s1_en: The thick wall casting must meet the dimensional tolerance.
s1_cn: 厚壁铸件必须满足尺寸公差要求。
s2_en: A thick gasket is used to seal the engine oil pan.
s2_cn: 厚密封垫片用于密封发动机油底壳。
s3_en: We measure the thick coating layer with a magnetic gauge.
s3_cn: 我们用磁力计测量厚涂层。

s1_en: The tight tolerance on the bore diameter is critical for fit.
s1_cn: 孔径的紧公差对配合至关重要。
s2_en: We maintain tight control over the injection molding process.
s2_cn: 我们对注塑工艺保持严格控制。
s3_en: A tight fit between parts reduces vibration and noise.
s3_cn: 零件之间的紧配合减少了振动和噪声。

s1_en: A tired operator is more likely to make assembly errors.
s1_cn: 疲劳的操作员更容易犯装配错误。
s2_en: We rotate tasks every 2 hours to prevent tired workers.
s2_cn: 我们每2小时轮换任务以防工人疲劳。
s3_en: The tired machine indicator signals when maintenance is overdue.
s3_cn: 机器疲劳指示器在维护逾期时发出信号。

s1_en: The true position tolerance is checked with a CMM measurement.
s1_cn: 真实位置公差用三坐标测量仪检查。
s2_en: We verify the true value of the sensor output against the reference.
s2_cn: 我们对照参考值验证传感器的真实输出值。
s3_en: The true cost of quality includes both prevention and appraisal costs.
s3_cn: 质量的真实成本包括预防成本和鉴定成本。

s1_en: The violent crash test simulates a 64 km per hour frontal impact.
s1_cn: 剧烈碰撞测试模拟64公里每小时的正面撞击。
s2_en: We design the body to absorb violent side impact forces.
s2_cn: 我们设计车身以吸收剧烈的侧面撞击力。
s3_en: The violent side pole test is mandatory for five star rating.
s3_cn: 剧烈的侧柱碰撞测试是五星评级的强制要求。

s1_en: Waiting time at each station is tracked to identify bottlenecks.
s1_cn: 每个工位的等待时间被跟踪以识别瓶颈。
s2_en: We reduce waiting inventory through just in time delivery.
s2_cn: 我们通过准时交付减少等待库存。
s3_en: The waiting area for finished vehicles is organized by shipment date.
s3_cn: 成品车辆等待区按发货日期组织。

s1_en: The warm up procedure for the stamping press takes 15 minutes.
s1_cn: 冲压机的预热程序需要15分钟。
s2_en: Warm forming technology improves the formability of aluminum sheets.
s2_cn: 温成型技术提升了铝板的成型性。
s3_en: We follow the warm up cycle before starting the daily production.
s3_cn: 我们在开始每日生产前遵循预热循环。

s1_en: The wet paint booth uses water to capture overspray particles.
s1_cn: 湿式喷漆室用水捕获过喷颗粒。
s2_en: Wet weather testing validates the wiper and sealing performance.
s2_cn: 潮湿天气测试验证雨刮和密封性能。
s3_en: We check the wet film thickness with a comb gauge during application.
s3_cn: 我们在施工时用梳规检查湿膜厚度。

s1_en: The wide track design improves vehicle stability at high speed.
s1_cn: 宽轮距设计提升了高速行驶的稳定性。
s2_en: A wide body allows for a more spacious interior cabin.
s2_cn: 宽车身使内部客舱更加宽敞。
s3_en: We offer a wide range of optional features for customization.
s3_cn: 我们提供广泛的可选配置供定制。

s1_en: A wise investment in automation reduced labor costs significantly.
s1_cn: 自动化方面的明智投资显著降低了人工成本。
s2_en: It is wise to maintain a backup supplier for critical components.
s2_cn: 为关键零件保留备用供应商是明智的。
s3_en: The wise engineering choice improved both quality and cost.
s3_cn: 明智的工程选择同时提升了质量和成本。

s1_en: Yellow lines on the floor mark the walkway boundaries.
s1_cn: 地面上的黄线标示人行通道边界。
s2_en: The yellow warning label must be visible on all shipments.
s2_cn: 黄色警示标签必须在所有货物上可见。
s3_en: Yellow indicators on the control panel signal caution status.
s3_cn: 控制面板上的黄色指示灯表示警示状态。

s1_en: The young engineer program recruits top graduates each year.
s1_cn: 青年工程师计划每年招募顶尖毕业生。
s2_en: Young professionals bring fresh perspectives to the R&D team.
s2_cn: 年轻的专业人才为研发团队带来新视角。
s3_en: We invest in training young technicians for future leadership roles.
s3_cn: 我们投资培训年轻技师为未来的领导角色做准备。

s1_en: All night shift operators must remain awake and alert at all times.
s1_cn: 所有夜班操作员必须随时保持清醒和警觉。
s2_en: We enforce the awake and alert policy through random checks.
s2_cn: 我们通过随机检查执行清醒警觉政策。
s3_en: Caffeine stations are placed near the line to keep workers awake.
s3_cn: 产线附近设有咖啡站以保持工人清醒。

s1_en: Bad parts are rejected and tagged at the inspection station.
s1_cn: 不良品在检验工位被拒收并贴标签。
s2_en: We replaced the bad material with a certified batch.
s2_cn: 我们用认证批次替换了不良材料。
s3_en: A bad weld joint is identified by the ultrasonic test.
s3_cn: 不良焊接接头通过超声检测识别。

s1_en: Bent tubes are used in the exhaust system routing.
s1_cn: 弯管用于排气系统布管。
s2_en: A bent frame rail must be reported and replaced immediately.
s2_cn: 弯曲的车架纵梁必须立即报告和更换。
s3_en: We verify the bent angle of each pipe with a gauge.
s3_cn: 我们用量规验证每根管子的弯曲角度。

s1_en: The bitter cold test simulates minus 40 degree Celsius conditions.
s1_cn: 严寒测试模拟零下40摄氏度条件。
s2_en: Bitter experience from past recalls drives our conservative design margins.
s2_cn: 过去召回的痛苦经验推动了我们保守的设计余量。
s3_en: We learned a bitter lesson about skipping the validation test.
s3_cn: 我们学到了跳过验证测试的惨痛教训。

s1_en: The blue finish must match the approved color sample.
s1_cn: 蓝色面漆必须与批准的色样一致。
s2_en: A new blue option was added for the overseas market.
s2_cn: 海外市场新增了蓝色选项。
s3_en: The blue paint code is specified in the design document.
s3_cn: 设计文件中明确了蓝色漆面代码。

s1_en: A certain quality threshold must be met before batch release.
s1_cn: 批次放行前必须达到特定质量阈值。
s2_en: Only certain suppliers are approved for safety critical parts.
s2_cn: 只有特定供应商获批供应安全关键件。
s3_en: We test certain batches more frequently based on risk level.
s3_cn: 我们根据风险等级对特定批次增加测试频率。

s1_en: The cold weather test is conducted at minus 30 degrees Celsius.
s1_cn: 寒冷天气测试在零下30摄氏度进行。
s2_en: Cold start performance is verified for all engine variants.
s2_cn: 所有发动机变体都验证了冷启动性能。
s3_en: Cold rolling improves the surface finish of steel sheets.
s3_cn: 冷轧改善了钢板表面质量。

s1_en: A complete vehicle audit is performed before market launch.
s1_cn: 上市前进行整车审计。
s2_en: We verify the complete assembly before releasing the vehicle for shipment.
s2_cn: 我们在放行车辆出货前验证完整装配。
s3_en: The complete documentation package is required for type approval.
s3_cn: 型式认证需要完整的文档包。

s1_en: The cruel environment test simulates desert and arctic conditions.
s1_cn: 严酷环境测试模拟沙漠和北极条件。
s2_en: Components must survive cruel temperature cycling from minus 40 to plus 80.
s2_cn: 零件必须在零下40到零上80的严酷温度循环中存活。
s3_en: We subject the body structure to cruel salt spray for 1,000 hours.
s3_cn: 我们对车身结构进行1,000小时严酷盐雾测试。

s1_en: The dark tinted glass reduces interior heat and UV exposure.
s1_cn: 深色玻璃减少了车内热量和紫外线照射。
s2_en: Dark color options are popular in the premium segment.
s2_cn: 深色选项在高端细分市场很受欢迎。
s3_en: We inspect the dark finish for uniform coverage and gloss.
s3_cn: 我们检查深色面漆的覆盖均匀度和光泽度。

s1_en: The dead zone in the blind spot detection system was eliminated.
s1_cn: 盲区检测系统中的盲区已被消除。
s2_en: A dead battery triggers a low voltage warning on the dashboard.
s2_cn: 电瓶没电触发仪表盘上的低电压警示。
s3_en: We check for dead pixels on the infotainment display screen.
s3_cn: 我们检查信息娱乐显示屏上的坏点。

s1_en: Dear customer feedback is prioritized in the improvement backlog.
s1_cn: 宝贵的客户反馈在改进待办中优先处理。
s2_en: The dear supplier relationship is maintained through quarterly reviews.
s2_cn: 宝贵的供应商关系通过季度评审维护。
s3_en: We treat dear market intelligence as a strategic asset.
s3_cn: 我们将宝贵的市场情报视为战略资产。

s1_en: Delicate sensors require anti static packaging during transport.
s1_cn: 精密传感器在运输中需要防静电包装。
s2_en: We handle delicate electronic parts in a controlled environment.
s2_cn: 我们在受控环境中处理精密电子零件。
s3_en: The delicate surface finish must be protected until final assembly.
s3_cn: 精密的表面处理必须保护到总装。

s1_en: Different markets require different emission and safety specifications.
s1_cn: 不同市场需要不同的排放和安全规格。
s2_en: We manage different supplier tiers for various component categories.
s2_cn: 我们为不同零件类别管理不同层级的供应商。
s3_en: Different color options are available based on regional preferences.
s3_cn: 不同地区偏好提供不同的颜色选项。

s1_en: A dirty surface causes paint adhesion failures.
s1_cn: 脏污表面导致油漆附着力失效。
s2_en: We reject dirty parts during the incoming inspection.
s2_cn: 我们在来料检验时拒收脏污零件。
s3_en: Dirty oil in the hydraulic system can damage the seals.
s3_cn: 液压系统中的脏油会损坏密封件。

s1_en: Dry film lubrication is applied to reduce friction without oil.
s1_cn: 干膜润滑用于在无油状态下减少摩擦。
s2_en: The dry process eliminates the need for solvent-based cleaners.
s2_cn: 干式工艺消除了对溶剂型清洁剂的需求。
s3_en: We store the raw material in a dry environment to prevent rust.
s3_cn: 我们将原材料储存在干燥环境中以防止生锈。

s1_en: The false reject rate of the vision system is below 0.5 percent.
s1_cn: 视觉系统的误判拒收率低于0.5%。
s2_en: A false alarm in the leak test wastes 15 minutes of production time.
s2_cn: 泄漏测试中的误报浪费15分钟生产时间。
s3_en: We tune the sensor to reduce false triggers on the line.
s3_cn: 我们调校传感器以减少产线误触发。

s1_en: A feeble signal from the sensor indicates a loose connection.
s1_cn: 传感器的微弱信号表明连接松动。
s2_en: The feeble weld strength was caught in the pull test.
s2_cn: 微弱的焊接强度在拉力测试中被发现。
s3_en: We monitor feeble vibration patterns to predict bearing failure.
s3_cn: 我们监控微弱振动模式以预测轴承失效。

s1_en: The female connector accepts the male plug with a click.
s1_cn: 阴接头以卡扣方式接受阳插头。
s2_en: A female thread on the bracket secures the mounting bolt.
s2_cn: 支架上的阴螺纹固定安装螺栓。
s3_en: We inspect the female fitting for damage before installation.
s3_cn: 安装前我们检查阴接头是否损坏。

s1_en: Foolish errors are prevented by the poka yoke system.
s1_cn: 防错系统预防低级错误。
s2_en: We review foolish mistakes in the weekly quality meeting.
s2_cn: 我们在每周质量会议上评审低级错误。
s3_en: A foolish decision to skip inspection led to a costly recall.
s3_cn: 跳过检查的错误决定导致了昂贵的召回。

s1_en: The future model roadmap includes three electric vehicles by 2028.
s1_cn: 未来车型路线图包括到2028年的三款电动汽车。
s2_en: We invest in future technology like solid state batteries.
s2_cn: 我们投资固态电池等未来技术。
s3_en: Future emission standards require a 30 percent reduction in NOx.
s3_cn: 未来排放标准要求氮氧化物减少30%。

s1_en: The green manufacturing initiative reduced waste by 30%.
s1_cn: 绿色制造倡议减少了30%的废料。
s2_en: We adopted a green supply chain certification program.
s2_cn: 我们采纳了绿色供应链认证计划。
s3_en: The green finish meets the environmental coating standard.
s3_cn: 绿色面漆符合环保涂层标准。

s1_en: An ill fitting part is detected by the assembly fixture sensor.
s1_cn: 配合不良件由装配夹具传感器检测。
s2_en: We prevent ill timed deliveries through synchronized logistics.
s2_cn: 我们通过同步物流防止时机不当的交付。
s3_en: Ill advised process changes are caught in the change review board.
s3_cn: 不当的工艺变更在变更评审委员会中被拦截。

s1_en: The last piece inspection confirms the process was stable throughout.
s1_cn: 末件检验确认工艺全程稳定。
s2_en: We review the last batch quality before changing the tooling.
s2_cn: 换模前我们评审末批质量。
s3_en: The last vehicle on the line gets a full functional test.
s3_cn: 产线最后一辆车进行全功能测试。

s1_en: A late delivery penalty applies to suppliers missing the agreed date.
s1_cn: 错过约定日期的供应商将面临延迟交付罚款。
s2_en: Late design changes increase tooling cost significantly.
s2_cn: 晚期设计变更显著增加工装成本。
s3_en: We track late shipments to identify chronic delivery issues.
s3_cn: 我们跟踪延迟出货以识别慢性交付问题。

s1_en: The left hand drive model is the standard configuration for China.
s1_cn: 左舵车型是中国的标准配置。
s2_en: Left side mirror adjustment is tested in the final inspection.
s2_cn: 左侧后视镜调节在终检中测试。
s3_en: We produce both left and right hand drive variants on the same line.
s3_cn: 我们在同一条产线上生产左舵和右舵变体。

s1_en: A loose connection in the wiring harness can cause intermittent faults.
s1_cn: 线束中的松动连接可能导致间歇性故障。
s2_en: We check for loose bolts during the final inspection.
s2_cn: 我们在终检时检查是否有松动螺栓。
s3_en: Loose tolerances are acceptable for non-critical dimensions.
s3_cn: 非关键尺寸允许较松的公差。

s1_en: A loud noise complaint from the customer triggered a teardown analysis.
s1_cn: 客户的噪声投诉触发了拆解分析。
s2_en: Loud operating equipment requires sound insulation enclosures.
s2_cn: 高噪声运行的设备需要隔音罩。
s3_en: We reduce loud exhaust notes through resonator tuning.
s3_cn: 我们通过谐振器调校降低排气噪声。

s1_en: The low emission engine meets the Euro 7 standard.
s1_cn: 低排放发动机符合欧7标准。
s2_en: A low center of gravity improves vehicle handling.
s2_cn: 低重心提升了车辆操控性。
s3_en: We keep the low defect rate below 50 parts per million.
s3_cn: 我们将低缺陷率保持在百万分之五十以下。

s1_en: The mixed model line produces three different vehicles simultaneously.
s1_cn: 混流生产线同时生产三种不同车辆。
s2_en: Mixed material joining requires specialized welding techniques.
s2_cn: 混合材料连接需要专门焊接技术。
s3_en: We manage mixed batch inventory using a first in first out rule.
s3_cn: 我们用先进先出规则管理混合批次库存。

s1_en: The narrow body variant is designed for the urban market.
s1_cn: 窄车身变体专为城市市场设计。
s2_en: Narrow tires reduce rolling resistance for better fuel economy.
s2_cn: 窄轮胎降低了滚动阻力以提升燃油经济性。
s3_en: We ensure the narrow clearance meets the safety standard.
s3_cn: 我们确保狭窄的间隙符合安全标准。

s1_en: The old model is being phased out by the end of this year.
s1_cn: 旧车型将在今年年底前淘汰。
s2_en: We replace old tooling with upgraded equipment during the model change.
s2_cn: 换型期间我们用升级设备替换旧工装。
s3_en: Old supplier contracts are renegotiated at renewal.
s3_cn: 旧供应商合同在续签时重新谈判。

s1_en: The opposite direction flow is used for returnable packaging.
s1_cn: 反向流向用于可回收包装。
s2_en: The opposite hand variant mirrors the left hand drive layout.
s2_cn: 对置变体镜像左舵布局。
s3_en: We test opposite polarity connections to verify the circuit protection.
s3_cn: 我们测试反极性连接以验证电路保护。

s1_en: Public road testing is the final validation before market launch.
s1_cn: 公共道路测试是上市前的最终验证。
s2_en: Public charging station compatibility is verified for all EV models.
s2_cn: 所有电动车型验证公共充电站兼容性。
s3_en: We monitor public perception through social media sentiment analysis.
s3_cn: 我们通过社交媒体情感分析监控公众认知。

s1_en: A rough surface finish on the mating face causes seal leakage.
s1_cn: 配合面的粗糙表面处理导致密封泄漏。
s2_en: Rough road testing validates the suspension durability.
s2_cn: 颠簸路面测试验证悬挂耐久性。
s3_en: We measure the rough texture with a profilometer gauge.
s3_cn: 我们用轮廓仪测量粗糙纹理。

s1_en: The sad quality result prompted a full process audit.
s1_cn: 糟糕的质量结果促使了全面工艺审计。
s2_en: We must not accept sad performance from any supplier.
s2_cn: 我们不能接受任何供应商的糟糕表现。
s3_en: The sad defect rate was a clear signal to change the process.
s3_cn: 糟糕的缺陷率是更换工艺的明确信号。

s1_en: The safe working load of the lifting equipment is displayed on the label.
s1_cn: 吊装设备的安全工作载荷显示在标签上。
s2_en: We ensure a safe working environment for all plant operators.
s2_cn: 我们确保所有车间操作员的安全工作环境。
s3_en: Safe storage of hazardous chemicals follows the regulation strictly.
s3_cn: 危险化学品的安全储存严格遵循法规。

s1_en: Secret prototype vehicles are stored in a restricted access facility.
s1_cn: 保密原型车存放在限制进入的设施中。
s2_en: We sign secret NDA agreements with all tier one suppliers.
s2_cn: 我们与所有一级供应商签署保密NDA协议。
s3_en: Secret project timelines are shared only with the core team.
s3_cn: 保密项目时间表仅与核心团队共享。

s1_en: The short lead time gives us a competitive advantage.
s1_cn: 短交付周期赋予我们竞争优势。
s2_en: A short circuit in the sensor wiring triggers a fault code.
s2_cn: 传感器线路中的短路触发故障码。
s3_en: We reduced the short cycle time by optimizing the stamping process.
s3_cn: 我们通过优化冲压工艺缩短了短循环时间。

s1_en: The shut down procedure is followed during emergency stop events.
s1_cn: 紧急停机事件中执行停机程序。
s2_en: A shut valve prevents fluid backflow in the hydraulic system.
s2_cn: 截止阀防止液压系统中的流体回流。
s3_en: We document the shut down sequence in the operator manual.
s3_cn: 我们在操作手册中记录停机顺序。

s1_en: A simple assembly process reduces the risk of operator error.
s1_cn: 简化的装配工艺降低了操作员出错风险。
s2_en: Simple design changes can significantly reduce manufacturing cost.
s2_cn: 简单的设计变更可以显著降低制造成本。
s3_en: We use simple color coding to identify different material grades.
s3_cn: 我们使用简单的颜色编码来区分不同材料等级。

s1_en: Slow moving inventory is identified and cleared every quarter.
s1_cn: 呆滞库存每季度识别和清理。
s2_en: A slow response from the supplier delayed the production start by 2 days.
s2_cn: 供应商的缓慢响应使生产启动延迟2天。
s3_en: We optimize slow cycle operations through lean improvement.
s3_cn: 我们通过精益改善优化慢循环工序。

s1_en: Small batch production is used for special edition models.
s1_cn: 小批量生产用于特别版车型。
s2_en: A small footprint robot is installed in the tight assembly area.
s2_cn: 小型机器人在紧凑的装配区域安装。
s3_en: We reduce the small defect rate through process improvement.
s3_cn: 我们通过工艺改进降低微小缺陷率。

s1_en: Soft touch materials are applied to the dashboard and door panels.
s1_cn: 软触材料应用于仪表板和车门面板。
s2_en: The soft seal around the door reduces wind noise at high speed.
s2_cn: 车门周围的软密封条降低了高速风噪。
s3_en: We test the soft foam density for seat comfort compliance.
s3_cn: 我们测试软泡沫密度以确保座椅舒适性达标。

s1_en: The solid steel frame provides superior crash protection.
s1_cn: 实心钢框架提供卓越的碰撞保护。
s2_en: Solid aluminum is used for the battery housing to reduce weight.
s2_cn: 电池外壳使用实心铝以减轻重量。
s3_en: We verify the solid structure integrity in the crash simulation.
s3_cn: 我们在碰撞仿真中验证实心结构完整性。

s1_en: Special tooling is required for the new model body in white.
s1_cn: 新车型白车身需要特殊工装。
s2_en: A special inspection is conducted for safety critical components.
s2_cn: 安全关键零件进行特殊检查。
s3_en: We provide special training for operators on the new equipment.
s3_cn: 我们为新设备操作员提供专门培训。

s1_en: A strange noise from the engine prompted a teardown inspection.
s1_cn: 发动机的异常噪声促成了拆解检查。
s2_en: We investigate strange vibration patterns in the transmission.
s2_cn: 我们调查变速箱中的异常振动模式。
s3_en: Strange measurement readings are flagged for engineering review.
s3_cn: 异常测量读数被标记为工程评审。

s1_en: The thin wall design reduces the overall vehicle weight.
s1_cn: 薄壁设计降低了整车重量。
s2_en: Thin sheet metal is used for non-structural body panels.
s2_cn: 非结构件车身面板使用薄钢板。
s3_en: We verify the thin film thickness on all coated parts.
s3_cn: 我们验证所有涂层零件的薄膜厚度。

s1_en: White is the standard fleet color for commercial vehicles.
s1_cn: 白色是商用车的标准车队颜色。
s2_en: The white paint must pass the UV resistance test.
s2_cn: 白色面漆必须通过抗UV测试。
s3_en: We verify the white color match before final shipment.
s3_cn: 我们在最终出货前验证白色配色匹配。

s1_en: A wrong part installation is caught by the poka yoke system.
s1_cn: 错件安装被防错系统拦截。
s2_en: We prevent wrong assembly through color coded labels and fixtures.
s2_cn: 我们通过颜色标签和夹具防止错误装配。
s3_en: The wrong material batch was quarantined before reaching the line.
s3_cn: 错误的材料批次在到达产线前被隔离。
